metadata.template_title: Badge: Pricing Table with Plan Badges
metadata.template_description: Pricing cards with popular/recommended badges
metadata.template_use_cases: ecommerce, retail, products, marketing
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, columnsgrid, badge, button

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: lg
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Starter
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: semibold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: $9
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#2B2F3B'
            align: center
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: per month
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#475569'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: '5 projects

            10GB storage

            Email support'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#475569'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Get Started
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f1f5f9'
            border:
              width: 1
              color: '#7c3aed'
          typography:
            color: '#7c3aed'
            weight: semibold
  - components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#7c3aed'
          radius: lg
          shadow: elevated
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: badge
        properties:
          text: MOST POPULAR
          variant: warning
          pill: true
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Professional
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: semibold
            color: '#ffffff'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: $29
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#ffffff'
            align: center
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: per month
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#e2e8f0'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: 'Unlimited projects

            100GB storage

            Priority support

            Custom domain'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#e2e8f0'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Start Free Trial
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
          typography:
            color: '#7c3aed'
            weight: semibold
  - components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Enterprise
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: semibold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: $99
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#2B2F3B'
            align: center
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: per month
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#475569'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: 'Everything in Pro

            Unlimited storage

            24/7 phone support

            SSO & SAML'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#475569'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Contact Sales
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f1f5f9'
            border:
              width: 1
              color: '#7c3aed'
          typography:
            color: '#7c3aed'
            weight: semibold

metadata.template_description: System status cards using all four badge variants
metadata.template_use_cases: ecommerce, retail, products, marketing
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, layout-column, heading, paragraph, columnsgrid, icon, badge

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#4f46e5'
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xs
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: fit
        horizontalAlign: center
        direction: row
      spacing:
        gap: sm
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        icon: star
        appearance:
          color: '#ffffff'
          size: sm
        name: star
        size: '36'
        strokeWidth: '2'
        color: '#4f46e5'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Free shipping on all orders over $50 — Limited time only!
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          color: '#4f46e5'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.6'
          transform: none
          letterSpacing: normal
          fontStyle: normal
          textDecoration: none
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          background:
            type: ''
            color: $color-background
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: none
          marginBlock: none
          marginInline: none
    - name: link
      properties:
        text: Shop Now →
        url: '#shop'
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.5'
          transform: none
          letterSpacing: normal
          fontStyle: normal
          textDecoration: none
        href: '#'
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          underline: true
          showArrow: false
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: none
          paddingInline: none
          marginBlock: xs
          marginInline: xs

metadata.template_title: Top Announcement Bar - Slim Site-Wide Notice Banner
metadata.template_description: A compact, single-row announcement strip with centered text and optional action link, designed to sit at the very top of a page for site-wide notices like free shipping thresholds, new feature launches, or limited-time offers
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, link, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#7c3aed'
          colorEnd: '#ec4899'
          direction: to right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: LIMITED TIME OFFER
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: bold
          color: '#fde68a'
          align: center
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Spring Sale — Up to 60% Off Everything
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.1'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Refresh your wardrobe with our biggest sale of the season. Hundreds
          of styles marked down. Don't miss out — offer ends Sunday.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#e9d5ff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Browse Deals
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          radius: lg
        typography:
          color: '#7c3aed'
          weight: bold
          size: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f9fafb'
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498049794561-7780e7231661
          altText: Product announcement hero image
        appearance:
          minHeight: 40
          fit: cover
          radius: none
          objectPosition: center
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: left
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xl
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: NEW ARRIVAL
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#2563eb'
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Introducing the Next Generation of Smart Devices
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#111827'
          lineHeight: '1.2'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Faster performance. Longer battery life. Sleeker design. Everything
          you loved, reimagined from the ground up for the way you work and play.
        typography:
          size: md

metadata.template_title: Cookie Consent Privacy Notice Banner - Bottom Page Notification
metadata.template_description: A compact, bottom-anchored privacy notice banner with a brief cookie usage explanation paragraph and two side-by-side action buttons (Accept and Decline), using subtle muted styling and small text for unobtrusive legal compliance
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, button, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: none
      verticalAlign: stretch
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: GET IN TOUCH
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#3b82f6'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Contact Us
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Have a question or want to work together? Fill out the form below and
          we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: vertical
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Full Name
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: name
            placeholder: John Doe
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email Address
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: john@example.com
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: dropdown
        properties:
          label:
            text: Subject
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: subject
            placeholder: Choose a topic
            options: 'General

              Support

              Partnership

              Other'
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            text: Message
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: message
            placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
            rows: 5
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Send Message
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#3b82f6'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: xl
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: md
      appearance: null
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: start
          widthMode: stretch
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: icon
        properties:
          name: phone
          size: '40'
          color: '#3b82f6'
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Phone
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: md
            weight: semibold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: '+1 (555) 123-4567

            Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.6'
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: start
          widthMode: stretch
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: icon
        properties:
          name: mail
          size: '40'
          color: '#3b82f6'
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Email
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: md
            weight: semibold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: 'hello@company.com

            We reply within 24 hours'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.6'
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: start
          widthMode: stretch
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: icon
        properties:
          name: map-pin
          size: '40'
          color: '#3b82f6'
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Address
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: md
            weight: semibold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: '123 Innovation Drive

            San Francisco, CA 94107'
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.6'

# Source: 02_centered_minimal_form.yaml | Page: home
# Template: Centered Minimal Contact Form Section | Description: A clean centered contact form with heading and description text above a vertically stacked form with textbox, textarea fields and a prominent call-to-action submit button | Section: contact | Layout: centered, stacked | Components: layout-row, layout-column, form, textbox, textarea, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, button | Use cases: consulting firm, law firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, digital agency, photography studio, architecture firm, accounting firm, tutoring center, wellness center | Visual style: minimal, modern
# Theme: primary=#111827 bg=#ffffff font='Poppins', sans-serif
# Component 1/1
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      wrap: wrap
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: center
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xl
        paddingInline: xl
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: CONTACT
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Let's Talk
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We'd love to hear about your project. Drop us a message and let's create
          something amazing together.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: vertical
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Your Name
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#111827'
          field:
            name: name
            placeholder: Jane Smith
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#8b5cf6'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#111827'
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: jane@example.com
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#8b5cf6'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Phone
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#111827'
          field:
            name: phone
            placeholder: +1 (555) 000-0000
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#8b5cf6'
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            text: Your Message
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#111827'
          field:
            name: message
            placeholder: Tell us about your project...
            rows: 5
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#8b5cf6'
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Send Message
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#8b5cf6'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch

metadata.template_description: A multi-location contact section using columnsgrid with office cards showing location name, address, phone, email, and office hours for each branch or office location

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: lg
      verticalAlign: start
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: mail
        size: '36'
        color: '#6366f1'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Send Us a Message
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Fill out the form and our team will respond as soon as possible.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: vertical
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Name
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: name
            placeholder: Your full name
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: you@example.com
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: dropdown
        properties:
          label:
            text: Topic
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: topic
            placeholder: Select a topic
            options: 'General Inquiry

              Technical Support

              Billing

              Feature Request

              Other'
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            text: Message
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: message
            placeholder: Describe your question or issue...
            rows: 5
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Submit
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#6366f1'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: xl
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: help-circle
        size: '36'
        color: '#6366f1'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Common Questions
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Find quick answers to the most frequently asked questions below.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: accordion
      properties:
        behavior:
          allowMultipleOpen: true
        typography:
          title:
            size: md
            weight: semibold
            color: '#1e293b'
          content:
            size: sm
            weight: regular
            color: '#64748b'
        appearance:
          border:
            position: bottom
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
      items:
      - title: What are your support hours?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9am to 6pm
              EST. For urgent issues outside business hours, please email urgent@company.com.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
      - title: How quickly will I get a response?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours on business
              days. Priority support customers receive responses within 4 hours.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
      - title: Can I schedule a demo or consultation?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Absolutely! Select 'General Inquiry' in the contact form and mention
              you'd like a demo. Our sales team will reach out to schedule a convenient
              time.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
      - title: Do you offer phone support?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Phone support is available for Business and Enterprise plan customers.
              You can reach us at +1 (555) 123-4567 during business hours.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
      - title: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Use the contact form with the 'Technical Support' or 'Feature Request'
              topic. Include as much detail as possible, including screenshots if
              applicable, so we can address your feedback quickly.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'

metadata.template_title: Contact Form with FAQ Accordion Section
metadata.template_description: A split-screen contact section combining a form on the left with a frequently asked questions accordion on the right, reducing support queries by answering common questions
metadata.template_use_cases: consulting firm, law firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, digital agency, photography studio, architecture firm, accounting firm, tutoring center, wellness center
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, form, textbox, textarea, dropdown, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      align: center
      wrap: wrap
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#1e293b'
          colorEnd: '#0f172a'
          direction: to right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
        horizontalAlign: center
        align: center
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: NEWSLETTER
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Stay Updated
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Get the latest news, product updates, and exclusive insights delivered
          straight to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#e2e8f0'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: inline
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            show: false
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: Enter your email address
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#f59e0b'
            background:
              color: '#1e293b'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 1
              style: solid
              color: '#334155'
            radius: md
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: lg
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Subscribe
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f59e0b'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#0f172a'
            weight: bold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Join 25,000+ subscribers. We respect your privacy.
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#94a3b8'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

# Theme: primary=#f8fafc bg=#0f172a font='Inter', sans-serif
# Component 1/1
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: COMING SOON
        variant: info
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Something Amazing Is On Its Way
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#f8fafc'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We're building something extraordinary. Be the first to know when we
          launch.
        typography:
          size: lg
          color: '#94a3b8'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
    - name: countdown
      properties:
        targetDate: '2026-06-15T00:00:00'
        format: DD:HH:MM:SS
        expiredText: We're live! Check it out.
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          align: center
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          gap: sm
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xl
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Get Notified
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#8b5cf6'
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Learn More
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
            border:
              width: 1
              color: '#94a3b8'
          typography:
            color: '#94a3b8'
            weight: semibold

metadata.template_description: Coming soon page with countdown timer and email signup
metadata.template_use_cases: events, launches, sales, promotions
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, layout-column, badge, heading, paragraph, countdown, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#8b5cf6'
          colorEnd: '#6366f1'
          direction: to right
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Our Impact So Far
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Numbers that speak for themselves
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#e2e8f0'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm

content:

  properties:

        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: counter-up
        properties:
          endValue: 4
          duration: 1500
          suffix: '.8'
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#8b5cf6'
            align: center

            weight: semibold

            align: center

            align: center
      - name: paragraph

          text: Enterprise customers worldwide
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
  - components:

        spacing:

      components:
      - name: counter-up
        properties:

      - name: counter-up
        properties:

            color: '#064e3b'

            align: center

metadata.template_description: Animated counters showing donation milestones
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS, dashboards, corporate, reports
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, layout-column, heading, paragraph, columnsgrid, icon, counter-up, progress-bar, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#1e3a8a'
          colorEnd: '#7c3aed'
          direction: to right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: LIMITED TIME
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#818cf8'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Start Your Free Trial Today
        level: 1
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: '1.1'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Join over 25,000 teams already accelerating their workflow. Get full
          access

          to every feature with no credit card required. Cancel anytime, no questions
          asked.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#e0e7ff'
          size: lg
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.7'
          weight: light
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xxl
        layout:
          widthMode: '75'
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Get Started Free
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 0
            style: solid
            color: transparent
          radius: pill
          shadow: elevated
        typography:
          color: '#1e1b4b'
          weight: bold
          size: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

metadata.template_description: A bold gradient background CTA banner with centered heading, persuasive paragraph text, and a prominent call-to-action button for sign-up or conversion with high visual impact
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, mobile app, online store, software company, fitness app, online course platform, subscription service, B2B platform, consulting firm, digital agency
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, heading, paragraph, button, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      align: center
      horizontalAlign: none
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f9fafb'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        align: start
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      appearance: null
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: xl
    components:
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: NEW
        variant: success
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Ready to Transform Your Business?
        level: 1
        typography:
          color: '#111827'
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          lineHeight: '1.15'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Our platform empowers teams to move faster, collaborate smarter, and
          deliver

          results that matter. From onboarding to scaling, we have you covered with

          tools built for the modern workforce.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#6b7280'
          size: md
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          align: center
          horizontalAlign: start
          wrap: wrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Get Started Free
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#4f46e5'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: transparent
            shadow: soft
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: lg
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Watch Demo
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
              transparency: 0
            border:
              width: 2
              style: solid
              color: '#4f46e5'
          typography:
            color: '#4f46e5'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184292/pexels-photo-3184292.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200
        altText: Team collaborating on product strategy
      appearance:
        minHeight: 37.5
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
        hoverEffect: zoom
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
        marginInline: none

          crafted native experience.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#6b7280'
          size: md
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          align: center
          horizontalAlign: start
          wrap: nowrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs

      - name: icon
        properties:

          color: '#2563eb'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Lightning-fast sync across all devices
          typography:
            color: '#6b7280'
            size: sm
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          align: center
          horizontalAlign: start
          wrap: nowrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
      components:
      - name: icon
        properties:
          name: shield
          size: '24'
          color: '#2563eb'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: End-to-end encryption for your data

            color: '#6b7280'
            size: sm
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-row

          horizontalAlign: start
          wrap: nowrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
      components:
      - name: icon
        properties:
          name: bell
          size: '24'
          color: '#2563eb'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Smart notifications that keep you informed
          typography:
            color: '#6b7280'
            size: sm
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          align: center
          horizontalAlign: start
          wrap: wrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: App Store
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#111827'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: transparent
            radius: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: lg
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Google Play
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#111827'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: transparent
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/607812/pexels-photo-607812.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      widthMode: '50'
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
      borderRadius: md
      shadow: soft
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Task Board
      level: 3
      typography:
        size: md
        weight: bold
        color: '#0f172a'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs
  - name: accordion
    properties:
      behavior:
        allowMultipleOpen: true
      appearance:
        border:
          position: bottom
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
    items:
    - title: Finalize Q1 revenue report
      components:
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            show: true
            text: Notes
          field:
            placeholder: Add notes for this task...
            value: Waiting on finance team to confirm APAC numbers. ETA Friday.
            rows: 3
    - title: Review onboarding flow redesign
      components:
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            show: true
            text: Notes
          field:
            placeholder: Add notes for this task...
            value: Figma link shared by design. Need UX sign-off before sprint planning.
            rows: 3
    - title: Migrate staging database to v3
      components:
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            show: true
            text: Notes
          field:
            placeholder: Add notes for this task...
            value: ''
            rows: 3
    - title: Prepare investor deck for board meeting
      components:
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            show: true
            text: Notes
          field:
            placeholder: Add notes for this task...
            value: Draft slides due Monday. Include ARR growth chart and churn metrics.
            rows: 3

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      widthMode: '50'
      gap: xs
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
      borderRadius: md
      shadow: soft
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: IN PROGRESS
      typography:
        size: xxs
        weight: bold
        color: '#6366f1'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxs
        paddingInline: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#f8fafc'
          transparency: 100
        borderRadius: pill
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Platform Redesign
      level: 3
      typography:
        size: lg
        weight: bold
        color: '#0f172a'
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Redesigning the core dashboard experience for enterprise customers. Sprint
        4 of 6 complete.
      typography:
        size: sm
        weight: regular
        color: '#64748b'
        lineHeight: relaxed
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: xs
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-between
        wrap: nowrap
        gap: md
        verticalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          widthMode: '33'
          gap: none
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: 67%
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#6366f1'
            align: center
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Complete
          typography:
            size: xxs
            weight: medium
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          widthMode: '33'
          gap: none
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: '12'
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Tasks Left
          typography:
            size: xxs
            weight: medium
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          widthMode: '33'
          gap: none
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Mar 15
          level: 4
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Deadline
          typography:
            size: xxs
            weight: medium
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: xs
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: start
        wrap: nowrap
        gap: xs
        verticalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde?w=32&h=32&fit=crop
          altText: Team member 1
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          borderRadius: pill
          fit: cover
          width: 32
          height: 32
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=32&h=32&fit=crop
          altText: Team member 2
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          borderRadius: pill
          fit: cover
          width: 32
          height: 32
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=32&h=32&fit=crop
          altText: Team member 3
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          borderRadius: pill
          fit: cover
          width: 32
          height: 32
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: +4 more
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        typography:
          size: xxs
          weight: medium
          color: '#64748b'

  properties:

      horizontalAlign: center
      widthMode: '66'
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
      borderRadius: md
      shadow: soft
  components:
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-between
        wrap: nowrap
        gap: md
        verticalAlign: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Revenue Trend
        level: 3
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f172a'
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: LIVE
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        typography:
          size: xxs
          weight: bold
          color: '#6366f1'
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxs
          paddingInline: xs
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f8fafc'
            transparency: 100
          borderRadius: pill
  - name: video-background
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2020/06/09/40775-430530472_large.mp4
        poster: ''
      appearance:
        aspectRatio: 16/9
        minHeight: 17.5
        objectFit: cover
        objectPosition: center
        borderRadius: sm
        overlay:
          enabled: true
          color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.75)
          opacity: 75
      playback:
        autoplay: true
        loop: true
        muted: true
      content:
        verticalAlign: end
        horizontalAlign: left
        padding: md
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-between
          wrap: nowrap
          gap: lg
          verticalAlign: end
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch
            horizontalAlign: start
            gap: none
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: $284,920
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: extrabold
              color: '#f8fafc'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Total revenue this quarter
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: regular
              color: '#64748b'
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: fit
            horizontalAlign: end
            gap: none
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: +23.4%
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: bold
              color: '#6366f1'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: vs last quarter
            typography:
              size: xxs
              weight: regular
              color: '#64748b'
              align: right
  - name: caption
    properties:
      text: Real-time data visualization powered by your analytics pipeline. Updates
        every 30 seconds.
      typography:
        size: xxs
        weight: regular
        color: '#64748b'
        align: left
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs

        allowMultipleOpen: false
      appearance:
        border:
          position: bottom
        radius: sm
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
    items:
    - title: What is your refund policy?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: We offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're
            not satisfied with our product for any reason, simply contact our support
            team within 30 days of purchase and we'll process your refund — no questions
            asked.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: How do I get started?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Getting started is easy. Simply sign up for an account, choose a plan
            that fits your needs, and follow our step-by-step onboarding guide. You'll
            be up and running in under five minutes. We also offer free onboarding
            calls for team plans.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Do you offer free trials?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all plans with full access to

            color: '#64748b'

      components:

            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'

    - title: What payment methods do you accept?
      components:

        properties:

            also pay via invoice with NET 30 terms.
          typography:
            size: sm

    - title: How do I contact support?
      components:

        properties:

            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'

metadata.template_title: Simple Accordion FAQ Section — Frequently Asked Questions
metadata.template_description: A clean FAQ section with centered heading and a single accordion component containing expandable question-answer pairs for common customer inquiries
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fafafe'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: HELP CENTER
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#8b5cf6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Find Answers by Topic
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#0f172a'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Browse our most frequently asked questions organized by category. Select
        a topic below to find the answers you need.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: tabs
    properties:
      layout:
        orientation: horizontal
        widthMode: '75'
      typography:
        label:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          active:
            color: '#8b5cf6'
          inactive:
            color: '#64748b'
      appearance:
        tab:
          background:
            active: '#fafafe'
            inactive: '#fafafe'
          border:
            width: 2
            style: solid
            position: lower
        content:
          background:
            color: '#fafafe'
            transparency: 100
          padding:
            block: lg
            inline: md
        shadow: none
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
    tabs:
    - title: Getting Started
      components:
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: How do I create an account?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Click the "Sign Up" button on our homepage and fill in your email,
                name, and password. You'll receive a verification email within minutes.
                Once verified, you can start using the platform immediately.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: What are the system requirements?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Our platform runs entirely in the browser, so you just need a
                modern web browser like Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge. We support
                the latest two versions of each browser. No software installation
                required.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Is there an onboarding tutorial?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes! After signing up, you'll be guided through an interactive
                onboarding tour that covers all the key features. We also have a comprehensive
                video library and documentation center available at any time.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Can I import data from other platforms?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Absolutely. We support CSV, JSON, and direct API imports from
                popular platforms. Our import wizard walks you through the process
                step by step, and our team is available to help with large-scale migrations.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Billing & Plans
      components:
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: What plans do you offer?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: We offer three plans — Starter (free), Professional ($29/month),
                and Enterprise (custom pricing). Each plan includes different feature
                sets and usage limits. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: You can change your plan at any time from the Billing section
                in your account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated
                charges. Downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a 50% discount on all paid plans for verified nonprofit
                organizations and educational institutions. Contact our sales team
                with proof of status to get your discount code.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: What happens if my payment fails?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: If a payment fails, we'll notify you via email and retry the charge
                after 3 days. You'll have a 14-day grace period to update your payment
                method before your account is downgraded to the free tier. No data
                is ever deleted.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Technical Support
      components:
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: How do I reset my password?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email
                address. You'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes.
                The link expires after 24 hours for security. If you don't see the
                email, check your spam folder.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Why is the platform running slowly?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Performance issues are usually related to browser cache or extensions.
                Try clearing your browser cache, disabling extensions, or using an
                incognito window. If the issue persists, check our status page for
                any ongoing incidents.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Navigate to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication and
                click "Enable." You can use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator
                or Authy. We also support SMS verification as a backup method.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you have an API I can integrate with?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a RESTful API available on Professional and Enterprise
                plans. Full API documentation, SDKs for popular languages, and webhooks
                are available in our developer portal. Rate limits vary by plan.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'

metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: FAQ
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#3b82f6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Frequently Asked Questions
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Find answers organized by category. Browse general questions on the left
        and technical questions on the right.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: top
        gap: lg
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: General Questions
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: What is your product and who is it for?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Our platform is an all-in-one solution designed for teams of all
                sizes. Whether you are a solo freelancer, a growing startup, or an
                enterprise organization, our tools help you streamline workflows,
                collaborate effectively, and deliver results faster.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How much does it cost?

              text: We offer a free tier for individuals, a Professional plan at $19/month,
                and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. All paid plans come with
                a 14-day free trial. Annual billing gives you two months free compared
                to monthly billing.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.
                If our product does not meet your expectations, contact support within
                30 days and we will process a complete refund with no questions asked.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Technical Questions
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: What are the system requirements?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Our platform is entirely cloud-based and runs in any modern browser
                including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. No downloads or plugins
                are required. We recommend a stable internet connection and a screen
                resolution of at least 1280x720 for the best experience.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you provide an API for integrations?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a comprehensive RESTful API available on Professional
                and Enterprise plans. Our developer documentation includes SDKs for
                JavaScript, Python, and Ruby, along with webhook support for real-time
                event notifications.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How do you handle data security?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: All data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with
                TLS 1.3. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Our infrastructure
                runs on AWS with automatic backups, and we conduct regular third-party
                penetration testing.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'

metadata.template_title: Two-Column Accordion FAQ — Dual Category Side by Side Layout
metadata.template_description: A two-column FAQ section using layout-row with two layout-columns each containing a categorized accordion, splitting General and Technical questions for organized browsing
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: HELP CENTER
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#7c3aed'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Frequently Asked Questions
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Browse our most commonly asked questions below. If you still need help,
        our support team is ready to assist you.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: accordion
    properties:
      behavior:
        allowMultipleOpen: false
      appearance:
        border:
          position: bottom
        radius: sm
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
    items:
    - title: How do I create an account?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Click the Sign Up button on our homepage and enter your email, name,
            and password. You will receive a verification email within minutes. Once
            verified, you can start using the platform immediately with access to
            all free-tier features.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: What payment methods do you accept?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American
            Express. PayPal is also supported for all plans. Enterprise customers
            can pay via invoice with NET 30 terms. All transactions are processed
            securely through Stripe.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Yes, you can change your plan at any time from your account settings.
            Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing for the remainder
            of your cycle. Downgrades apply at the start of your next billing period
            and no data is ever lost.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Is there a free trial available?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Absolutely. Every paid plan includes a 14-day free trial with full
            access to all features. No credit card is required to start your trial.
            At the end of the period, you can choose a plan or continue with our generous
            free tier.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: How do I cancel my subscription?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Billing section
            in your account settings. There are no cancellation fees or long-term
            contracts. Your access continues until the end of your current billing
            period, and all your data remains available.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
  - name: br
    properties:
      appearance:
        style: solid
        color: '#64748b'
        transparency: 20
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
        paddingBlock: xl
        paddingInline: xl
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#7c3aed'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        icon: mail
        appearance:
          size: xl
          color: '#ffffff'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Still have questions?
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We are here to help. Reach out to our support team and we will get back
          to you within a few hours.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Contact Us
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#7c3aed'
          weight: semibold
          size: sm

metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
