content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      gap: xl
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: md
        widthMode: '50'
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: FAQ
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#2563eb'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Questions? We have answers.
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#0f172a'
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: '1.2'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Everything you need to know about getting started. Browse the most common
          questions or reach out to our team for personalized help.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: image
      properties:
        src: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184291/pexels-photo-3184291.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
        alt: Team collaborating on answers
        appearance:
          radius: lg
          aspectRatio: '4:3'
          objectFit: cover
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: md
        widthMode: '50'
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Common Questions
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f172a'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: accordion
      properties:
        behavior:
          allowMultipleOpen: false
        appearance:
          border:
            position: bottom
          radius: sm
      items:
      - title: How do I get started with the platform?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Getting started is simple. Create a free account, follow our interactive
              onboarding guide, and you will be set up in under five minutes. We also
              offer live onboarding sessions every weekday for new users who prefer
              a guided walkthrough.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: What integrations do you support?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: We integrate with over 100 popular tools including Slack, Google
              Workspace, Microsoft Teams, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zapier. Our open
              API also lets you build custom integrations tailored to your specific
              workflow requirements.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: Can I try before I buy?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Yes, every paid plan comes with a 14-day free trial that gives you
              full access to all features. No credit card is needed to start. At the
              end of the trial you can select a plan or continue using our free tier
              at no cost.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: What level of support is included?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: All plans include access to our help center and community forum.
              Professional plans add priority email support with a four-hour response
              guarantee. Enterprise customers get 24/7 phone support and a dedicated
              customer success manager.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: Is my data safe and private?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Security is fundamental to our platform. We use AES-256 encryption
              at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, and maintain SOC 2 Type II certification.
              We are fully GDPR compliant, perform regular penetration testing, and
              never share your data with third parties.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'

# Source: 05_illustrated_faq.yaml | Page: home
# Template: Illustrated Split-Screen FAQ — Image Left Accordion Right | Description: A split-screen FAQ section with a large illustration image and heading on the left and a five-item accordion of expandable questions on the right using a 50/50 layout-row for visual balance | Section: faq | Layout: split_screen | Components: layout-row, layout-column, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, image | Use cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service | Visual style: modern, minimal
# Theme: primary=#0f172a bg=#ffffff font='Inter', sans-serif
# Component 1/1
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      gap: xl
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: md
        widthMode: '50'
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: FAQ
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#2563eb'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Questions? We have answers.
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#0f172a'
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: '1.2'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Everything you need to know about getting started. Browse the most common
          questions or reach out to our team for personalized help.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: image
      properties:
        src: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184291/pexels-photo-3184291.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
        alt: Team collaborating on answers
        appearance:
          radius: lg
          aspectRatio: '4:3'
          objectFit: cover
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: md
        widthMode: '50'
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Common Questions
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f172a'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: accordion
      properties:
        behavior:
          allowMultipleOpen: false
        appearance:
          border:
            position: bottom
          radius: sm
      items:
      - title: How do I get started with the platform?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Getting started is simple. Create a free account, follow our interactive
              onboarding guide, and you will be set up in under five minutes. We also
              offer live onboarding sessions every weekday for new users who prefer
              a guided walkthrough.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: What integrations do you support?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: We integrate with over 100 popular tools including Slack, Google
              Workspace, Microsoft Teams, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zapier. Our open
              API also lets you build custom integrations tailored to your specific
              workflow requirements.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: Can I try before I buy?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Yes, every paid plan comes with a 14-day free trial that gives you
              full access to all features. No credit card is needed to start. At the
              end of the trial you can select a plan or continue using our free tier
              at no cost.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: What level of support is included?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: All plans include access to our help center and community forum.
              Professional plans add priority email support with a four-hour response
              guarantee. Enterprise customers get 24/7 phone support and a dedicated
              customer success manager.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: Is my data safe and private?
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Security is fundamental to our platform. We use AES-256 encryption
              at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, and maintain SOC 2 Type II certification.
              We are fully GDPR compliant, perform regular penetration testing, and
              never share your data with third parties.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'

          size: xxl

metadata.template_description: A feature showcase using alternating left-right layout-row pairs with images on one side and text content on the other, creating a visual zigzag rhythm for highlighting product benefits
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, mobile app, software company, online store, consulting firm, logistics company, tutoring center, dental clinic, gym, digital agency
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, image, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, icon, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: xl
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3183150/pexels-photo-3183150.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
        altText: Team collaborating on project
      appearance:
        minHeight: 20
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: md
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: COLLABORATE
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#2563eb'
          transform: uppercase

content:

        md: 2

content:
- name: image
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1287145/pexels-photo-1287145.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1920
      altText: Majestic mountain landscape at golden hour
    appearance:
      minHeight: 100vh
      fit: cover
      cornerStyle: none
      hoverEffect: zoom
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
    layout:
      widthMode: stretch
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: lg
      appearance:
        background:
          color: rgba(0,0,0,0.45)
          transparency: 100
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
          wrap: nowrap
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: DISCOVER THE EXTRAORDINARY
          typography:
            color: '#DFDFDF'
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            letterSpacing: wider
            transform: uppercase
            lineHeight: '1'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
          appearance:
            background:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15)
              transparency: 100
            radius: pill
            shadow: medium
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Explore Beyond Horizons
        level: 1
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
      layout:
        widthMode: 75
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Embark on journeys that transform. From snow-capped peaks to endless
          coastlines,

          discover destinations that speak to your soul and awaken your sense of wonder.

          '
        typography:
          color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9)
          size: lg
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.7'
          weight: light
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
        layout:
          widthMode: 50
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: wrap
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Start Your Journey
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: transparent
          typography:
            color: '#0a0a0a'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Watch Film
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
              transparency: 0
            border:
              width: 2
              style: solid
              color: '#ffffff'
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xl
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Scroll to explore
          typography:
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6)
            size: xs
            align: center
            weight: light
            letterSpacing: wide
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: ↓
          typography:
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6)
            size: lg
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none

- name: image
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1076758/pexels-photo-1076758.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1920
      altText: Person standing on mountain peak at sunrise
    appearance:
      minHeight: 100vh
      fit: cover
      cornerStyle: none
      hoverEffect: zoom
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
    layout:
      widthMode: stretch
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: xl
      appearance:
        background:
          color: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.4) 60%,
            transparent 100%)
          transparency: 100
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          tag: section
          verticalAlign: center
          wrap: wrap
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          marginInline: none
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: sm
        appearance:
          background:
            type: solid
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 0
          border:
            width: 0
            style: solid
            color: '#1a1a1a'
          radius: none
          shadow: none
          shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: —
          typography:
            color: '#d4af37'
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            align: left
            lineHeight: '1.6'
            transform: none
            letterSpacing: normal
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            marginInline: none
            paddingBlock: none
            paddingInline: none
          layout: null
          appearance:
            background:
              type: solid
              color: '#DFDFDF'
              transparency: 0
            radius: none
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: CHAPTER ONE
          typography:
            color: '#d4af37'
            size: xl
            weight: bold
            letterSpacing: wider
            transform: uppercase
            align: left
            lineHeight: '1.6'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            marginInline: none
            paddingBlock: none
            paddingInline: none
          layout: null
          appearance:
            background:
              type: solid
              color: '#DFDFDF'
              transparency: 0
            radius: none
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Every summit begins with a single step
        level: 2
        layout:
          widthMode: '50'
        typography:
          color: '#d4af37'
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          lineHeight: '1.15'
          letterSpacing: tight
          align: center
          transform: none
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          marginInline: none
          paddingBlock: none
          paddingInline: none
        appearance:
          background:
            type: solid
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 0
          radius: none
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'In the quiet moments before dawn, when the world still sleeps,

          they begin their journey. Not for glory. Not for recognition.

          But for the pure, unfiltered experience of being alive.

          '
        layout:
          widthMode: '33'
        typography:
          color: '#DFDFDF'
          size: lg
          lineHeight: '1.8'
          weight: semibold
          align: left
          transform: none
          letterSpacing: normal
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
          marginInline: none
          paddingBlock: none
          paddingInline: none
        appearance:
          background:
            type: solid
            color: '#DFDFDF'
            transparency: 0
          radius: none
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: '33'
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: LOCATION
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5)
              size: xxs
              weight: medium
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Patagonia, Chile
            typography:
              color: '#DFDFDF'
              size: sm
              weight: medium
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: '33'
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: ELEVATION
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5)
              size: xxs
              weight: medium
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 4,892 meters
            typography:
              color: '#DFDFDF'
              size: sm
              weight: medium
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: '33'
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: EXPEDITION
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5)
              size: xxs
              weight: medium
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 12 Days
            typography:
              color: '#DFDFDF'
              size: sm
              weight: medium
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xl
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Begin the Journey
          appearance:
            background:
              type: gradient
              gradient:
                colorStart: '#d4af37'
                colorEnd: '#d4af37'
                direction: to right
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: transparent
            shadow: medium
            shadowColor: '#d4af37'
          typography:
            color: '#1a1a1a'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Watch Documentary
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
              transparency: 0
            border:
              width: 1
              style: solid
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4)
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: medium
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xxl
      components:
      - name: blockquote
        properties:
          quote: The mountains are calling and I must go.
          cite: ' John Muir'
          typography:
            size: md
            weight: light
            color: '#DFDFDF'
            align: center
            lineHeight: '1.6'
            transform: none
            letterSpacing: normal
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
              transparency: 0
              type: solid
            border:
              accentColor: '#d4af37'
              width: 2
              style: solid
              position: left
            radius: none
            shadow: none
            shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none

            paddingInline: md

metadata.template_description: A sophisticated, editorial-style tile layout inspired by fashion magazines
metadata.template_use_cases: Fashion brands, lifestyle blogs, editorial content, luxury
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, titlebar, image, heading, link

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-between
      wrap: nowrap
      tag: section
      verticalAlign: stretch
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
    background:
      color: '#f8f6f3'
      transparency: 100
    appearance:
      background:
        type: solid
        color: '#f8f6f3'
        transparency: 0
      border:
        width: 0
        style: solid
        color: '#1a1a1a'
      radius: none
      shadow: none
      shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/2681751/pexels-photo-2681751.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200
        altText: Fashion editorial portrait
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
      appearance:
        minHeight: 42
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
        hoverEffect: zoom
        objectPosition: center
        filter: none
        shadow: none
        shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
        lazy: true
        overlay:
          enabled: false
          color: '#1a1a1a'
          opacity: 1
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
        paddingBlock: none
        paddingInline: none
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xxl
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: COVER STORY
          typography:
            color: '#f8f6f3'
            size: xxs
            weight: bold
            letterSpacing: wider
            transform: uppercase
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: The Art of Quiet Luxury
          level: 2
          typography:
            color: '#f8f6f3'
            size: xxl
            weight: bold
            lineHeight: '1.1'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: How understated elegance is redefining modern fashion
          typography:
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Read the full story →
          typography:
            color: '#f8f6f3'
            size: sm
            weight: medium
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '33'
        horizontalAlign: center
        tag: section
        verticalAlign: center
        wrap: nowrap
        gap: none
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: none
        paddingInline: none
        marginBlock: none
        marginInline: none
      appearance:
        background:
          type: solid
          color: '#f8f6f3'
          transparency: 0
        border:
          width: 0
          style: solid
          color: '#1a1a1a'
        radius: none
        shadow: none
        shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3622614/pexels-photo-3622614.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
          altText: Designer accessories
        appearance:
          minHeight: 21
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          hoverEffect: zoom
          objectPosition: center
          filter: none
          shadow: none
          shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
          lazy: true
          overlay:
            enabled: false
            color: '#1a1a1a'
            opacity: 1
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          paddingBlock: none
          paddingInline: none
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: md
          appearance:
            background:
              color: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, transparent 70%)
              transparency: 100
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: ACCESSORIES
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7)
              size: xxs
              weight: bold
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xxl
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: The Bags to Invest In
            level: 3
            typography:
              color: '#f8f6f3'
              size: lg
              weight: bold
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1536619/pexels-photo-1536619.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
          altText: Beauty editorial
        appearance:
          minHeight: 21
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          hoverEffect: zoom
          objectPosition: center
          filter: none
          shadow: none
          shadowColor: '#1a1a1a'
          lazy: true
          overlay:
            enabled: false
            color: '#1a1a1a'
            opacity: 1
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          paddingBlock: none
          paddingInline: none
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: md
          appearance:
            background:
              color: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, transparent 70%)
              transparency: 100
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: BEAUTY
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7)
              size: xxs
              weight: bold
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xxl
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Glow Like Glass
            level: 3
            typography:
              color: '#f8f6f3'
              size: lg
              weight: bold
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none

metadata.template_description: A bold, unconventional layout with overlapping elements and creative tension
metadata.template_use_cases: Creative agencies, artists, photographers, avant-garde brands
metadata.header_base_components: page, titlebar, layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, heading, button, image, link

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: none
      wrap: wrap
      verticalAlign: start
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
    background:
      color: '#0d0d0d'
      transparency: 100
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '33'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: xl
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: ©2026
          typography:
            color: '#808080'
            size: xs
            weight: medium
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: —
          typography:
            color: '#808080'
            size: xs
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: CREATIVE STUDIO
          typography:
            color: '#808080'
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            letterSpacing: wide
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: none
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: WE
          level: 1
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            size: xxxl
            weight: bold
            lineHeight: '0.85'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: CREATE
          level: 1
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            size: xxxl
            weight: bold
            lineHeight: '0.85'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: BOLD
          level: 1
          typography:
            color: '#ff3366'
            size: xxxl
            weight: bold
            lineHeight: '0.85'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'We''re a collective of designers, developers, and dreamers

          who believe in pushing boundaries. We don''t follow trends—

          we set them.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#808080'
          size: md
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
        layout:
          widthMode: '75'
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: start
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: none
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: '147'
            level: 2
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Projects
            typography:
              color: '#808080'
              size: xs
              weight: medium
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: none
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: '23'
            level: 2
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Awards
            typography:
              color: '#808080'
              size: xs
              weight: medium
              letterSpacing: wide
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Explore Our Work
        appearance:
          background:
            type: gradient
            gradient:
              colorStart: '#ff3366'
              colorEnd: '#ff3366'
              direction: to right
          border:
            width: 0
            style: solid
            color: transparent
          shadow: medium
          shadowColor: '#ff3366'
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: semibold
          size: sm
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xl
        layout: null
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '66'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184360/pexels-photo-3184360.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200
          altText: Creative team in action
        appearance:
          minHeight: 31.25
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          shadow: elevated
          shadowColor: '#ff3366'
          hoverEffect: zoom
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184418/pexels-photo-3184418.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=400
            altText: Design detail
          appearance:
            minHeight: 12.5
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: none
            hoverEffect: zoom
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: LATEST PROJECT
            typography:
              color: '#808080'
              size: xxs
              weight: bold
              letterSpacing: wider
              transform: uppercase
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Nike Air Max
            level: 3
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: lg
              weight: bold
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Brand Campaign
            typography:
              color: '#808080'
              size: sm
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: View Case Study →
            typography:
              color: '#ff3366'
              size: sm
              weight: medium
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm

metadata.template_description: A bold, unconventional layout with overlapping elements and creative tension
metadata.template_use_cases: Creative agencies, artists, photographers, avant-garde brands
metadata.header_base_components: page, titlebar, layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, heading, button, image, link

content:
- name: carousel
  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 3000
      loop: true
    navigation:
      showArrows: false
      showDots: false
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
  slides:
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1763075/pexels-photo-1763075.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1920
          altText: Concert crowd with lights
        appearance:
          minHeight: 40
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          hoverEffect: zoom
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            align: center
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          appearance:
            background:
              color: rgba(0,0,0,0.6)
              transparency: 100
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: xxxl
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            appearance:
              background:
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.15)
                transparency: 100
              radius: pill
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.3)
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: xs
              paddingInline: md
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: ●
              typography:
                color: '#ef4444'
                size: sm
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: LIVE EVENT
              typography:
                color: '#DFDFDF'
                size: xs
                weight: bold
                letterSpacing: wider
                transform: uppercase
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: ELECTRIC NIGHTS
            level: 1
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xxxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: FESTIVAL 2026
            level: 2
            typography:
              color: '#fbbf24'
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: AUGUST 15-17  •  CENTRAL PARK, NYC
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
              size: md
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              wrap: wrap
            spacing:
              marginBlock: lg
          components:
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: Get Tickets
              appearance:
                background:
                  type: gradient
                  gradient:
                    colorStart: '#fbbf24'
                    colorEnd: '#fbbf24'
                    direction: to right
                border:
                  width: 0
                  style: solid
                  color: transparent
                shadow: medium
                shadowColor: '#fbbf24'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
                paddingBlock: md
                paddingInline: xl
              typography:
                color: '#000000'
                weight: bold
                size: md
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: View Lineup
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: transparent
                  transparency: 0
                border:
                  width: 2
                  style: solid
                  color: '#ffffff'
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                weight: semibold
                size: md
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xl
          components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:

# Source: 11_video_background (check again).yaml | Page: home
# Template: Video Background Style Hero Section | Description: A dynamic above-fold hero simulating video background using auto-playing carousel with multiple full-screen slides, dark overlay, live event badge, large bold headline, date and location info, dual CTA buttons, and countdown timer — high-energy event landing page | Section: hero | Layout: carousel_slider | Components: carousel, image, layout-column, layout-row, paragraph, heading, button | Use cases: SaaS platform, online store, digital agency, law firm, consulting firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, restaurant, gym, photography studio | Visual style: dark_mode, bold_typography
# Theme: primary=#ffffff bg=#000000 font='Inter', sans-serif
# Component 1/1
- name: carousel
  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 3000
      loop: true
    navigation:
      showArrows: false
      showDots: false
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
  slides:
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1763075/pexels-photo-1763075.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1920
          altText: Concert crowd with lights
        appearance:
          minHeight: 40
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          hoverEffect: zoom
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            align: center
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          appearance:
            background:
              color: rgba(0,0,0,0.6)
              transparency: 100
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: xxxl
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            appearance:
              background:
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.15)
                transparency: 100
              radius: pill
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.3)
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: xs
              paddingInline: md
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: ●
              typography:
                color: '#ef4444'
                size: sm
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: LIVE EVENT
              typography:
                color: '#DFDFDF'
                size: xs
                weight: bold
                letterSpacing: wider
                transform: uppercase
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: ELECTRIC NIGHTS
            level: 1
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xxxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: FESTIVAL 2026
            level: 2
            typography:
              color: '#fbbf24'
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: AUGUST 15-17  •  CENTRAL PARK, NYC
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
              size: md
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              wrap: wrap
            spacing:
              marginBlock: lg
          components:

# Source: 18_immersive_motion.yaml | Page: root
# Template: Hero Card Variant: Immersive Motion | Description: video-background containing a centered layout-column with heading and button | Section: hero | Layout: fullscreen | Components: page, video-background, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button | Use cases: Tech companies, creative agencies, event promotions, product showcases | Visual style: dark_mode
# Theme: primary=#000000 bg=#ffffff font=?
# Component 1/1
- name: video-background
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2024/06/04/214957_large.mp4
      poster: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504384308090-c894fdcc538d?w=1200
    appearance:
      minHeight: 37.5
      objectFit: cover
      overlay:
        enabled: true
        color: rgba(0,0,0,0.55)
        opacity: 55
    playback:
      autoplay: true
      loop: true
      muted: true
      playsinline: true
    content:
      verticalAlign: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      padding: xl
    layout:
      widthMode: stretch
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: md
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: EXPERIENCE THE FUTURE
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#6366f1'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Where Innovation Meets Imagination
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Immerse yourself in a world of limitless possibilities.
        typography:
          size: lg
          color: '#e2e8f0'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Explore Now
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#6366f1'
          radius: pill
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xl

  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        widthMode: '50'
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: START YOUR FREE TRIAL
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#059669'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Grow Your Business 10x Faster
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
          letterSpacing: tight
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Join 50,000+ businesses that trust us to drive growth.

          No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

          '
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#4b5563'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          verticalAlign: center
          gap: md
          wrap: wrap
        appearance:
          background:
            transparency: 0
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Trusted by 500+ companies
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#4b5563'
            align: left
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '50'
        gap: sm

        background:

        border:
          width: 1

        paddingBlock: lg

      properties:
        text: Get Started Today

          size: lg
          weight: bold

          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          direction: column
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Full Name
            show: true
          field:
            placeholder: John Doe
            required: true
          appearance:
            border:
              width: 1
              color: '#4b5563'
            radius: sm
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Work Email
            show: true
          field:
            placeholder: john@company.com
            required: true
          appearance:
            border:

      - name: button
        properties:

            widthMode: stretch

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#0f172a'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: DISCOVER OUR SERVICES
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#818cf8'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Solutions for Every Challenge
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#ffffff'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Explore our comprehensive suite of tools designed to accelerate your success.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#94a3b8'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: tabs
    properties:
      layout:
        orientation: horizontal
        widthMode: stretch
      typography:
        label:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          active:
            color: '#818cf8'
          inactive:
            color: '#94a3b8'
      appearance:
        tab:
          background:
            active: '#ffffff'
            inactive: '#ffffff'
          border:
            width: 2
            style: solid
            position: lower
        content:
          background:
            color: '#0f172a'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            color: '#94a3b8'
            width: 1
            style: solid
          padding:
            block: lg
            inline: lg
        shadow: none
        shadowColor: '#0f172a'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
        marginInline: none
    tabs:
    - title: Marketing
      components:
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            verticalAlign: center
            wrap: nowrap
            gap: lg
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: left
              widthMode: '50'
              gap: sm

              background:
                transparency: 0
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Digital Marketing Suite

              typography:
                size: xl
                weight: bold
                color: '#ffffff'
                align: left
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: 'Drive traffic, generate leads, and convert customers

                with our AI-powered marketing tools.

                '
              typography:
                size: md
                color: '#94a3b8'
                align: left
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: Learn More
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#818cf8'
                radius: md
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                weight: semibold
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=600
              altText: Marketing dashboard
            appearance:
              minHeight: 15
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
            layout:
              widthMode: '50'
    - title: Analytics
      components:
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            verticalAlign: center
            wrap: nowrap
            gap: lg
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: left
              widthMode: '50'
              gap: sm
            appearance:
              background:
                transparency: 0
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Real-Time Analytics
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: xl
                weight: bold
                color: '#ffffff'
                align: left
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: 'Track every metric that matters with beautiful dashboards

                and actionable insights.

                '
              typography:
                size: md
                color: '#94a3b8'
                align: left
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: View Demo
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#818cf8'
                radius: md
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                weight: semibold
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71?w=600
              altText: Analytics charts
            appearance:
              minHeight: 15
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
            layout:
              widthMode: '50'
    - title: Automation
      components:
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            verticalAlign: center
            wrap: nowrap
            gap: lg
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: left
              widthMode: '50'
              gap: sm
            appearance:
              background:
                transparency: 0
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Workflow Automation
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: xl
                weight: bold
                color: '#ffffff'
                align: left
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: 'Automate repetitive tasks and focus on what truly matters

                for your business growth.

                '
              typography:
                size: md
                color: '#94a3b8'
                align: left
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: Get Started
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#818cf8'
                radius: md
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                weight: semibold
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518432031352-d6fc5c10da5a?w=600

            appearance:

            layout:

# Template: Hero Card Variant: Centered Minimalist | Description: layout-column (align: center) with an eyebrow, heading, and paragraph | Section: hero | Layout: centered | Components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button | Use cases: Product launches, SaaS, creative tools, design platforms | Visual style: minimal
# Theme: primary=#111827 bg=#ffffff font=?
# Component 1/1
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: sm
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: INTRODUCING V2.0
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#6366f1'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: 'Less noise.

        More clarity.

        '
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#111827'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.1'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: 'We believe great design speaks for itself. Our platform strips away

        the unnecessary to reveal what truly matters.

        '
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#6b7280'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.8'
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
  - name: button
    properties:
      text: Experience Simplicity
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#111827'
        radius: pill
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: semibold
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: xl

metadata.template_description: layout-column (align: center) with an eyebrow, heading, and paragraph
metadata.template_use_cases: Product launches, SaaS, creative tools, design platforms
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: carousel
  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 5000
      loop: true
      pauseOnHover: true
      swipeEnabled: true
      swipeThreshold: 50
      keyboardNavigation: true
    animation:
      effect: fade
      duration: 600
    navigation:
      showArrows: true
      arrowStyle: chevron
      arrowPosition: inside
      showDots: true
    indicators:
      style: dashes
      position: bottom
    accessibility:
      showPauseButton: true
      ariaLabel: Story carousel
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
  slides:
  - components:
    - name: image

        source:

        appearance:
          minHeight: 35
          fit: cover
          overlay:
            enabled: true
            color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
            opacity: 50
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
            padding:
              block: xl
              inline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: CHAPTER ONE
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider

              align: center
        - name: paragraph

        layout:

      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:

            horizontalAlign: center
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:

            padding:
              block: xl
              inline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: CHAPTER TWO
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
              align: center
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Building Together, Growing Stronger
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxxl
              weight: extrabold
              color: '#ffffff'
              align: center
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Collaboration is the heartbeat of innovation.
            typography:
              size: lg
              color: '#e2e8f0'
              align: center
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?w=1200
          altText: Future technology
        appearance:
          minHeight: 35
          fit: cover
          overlay:
            enabled: true
            color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5)
            opacity: 50
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
            padding:
              block: xl
              inline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: CHAPTER THREE
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
              align: center
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: The Future Is Already Here

metadata.template_title: Hero Card Variant: The Story Starter
metadata.template_description: carousel containing three slides, each with a different image and heading overlay
metadata.template_use_cases: creative agencies, portfolios, storytelling brands, media
metadata.header_base_components: carousel, image, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: video-background
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2020/05/25/40130_large.mp4
      poster: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507525428034-b723cf961d3e?w=1200
    appearance:
      minHeight: 31.25
      objectFit: cover
      overlay:
        enabled: true
        color: rgba(15,23,42,0.7)
        opacity: 70
    playback:
      autoplay: true
      loop: true
      muted: true
      playsinline: true
    content:
      verticalAlign: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      padding: xl
    layout:
      widthMode: stretch
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: md
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: What are you looking for?
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Search across thousands of resources, articles, and tools.
        typography:
          size: lg
          color: '#94a3b8'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          direction: row
          horizontalAlign: center
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            show: false
          field:
            placeholder: Search anything...
            required: false
          appearance:
            border:
              width: 0
              color: '#ffffff'
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            radius: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Search
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#6366f1'
            radius: pill
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: bold
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: lg
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          verticalAlign: center
          gap: md
          wrap: wrap
        appearance:
          background:
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: 'Popular:'
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#94a3b8'
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Getting Started
          href: '#'
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6366f1'
          appearance:
            underline: false
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Templates
          href: '#'
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6366f1'
          appearance:
            underline: false
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: API Docs
          href: '#'
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6366f1'
          appearance:
            underline: false

metadata.template_description: layout-column centered over a video-background with a large textbox for site-wide search
metadata.template_use_cases: Knowledge bases, documentation sites, resource directories, search platforms
metadata.header_base_components: page, video-background, layout-column, layout-row, heading, paragraph, form, textbox, button, caption, link

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: xl
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: gif
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://media.giphy.com/media/l46Cy1rHbQ92uuLXa/giphy.gif
        altText: Product demo animation
      appearance:
        minHeight: 20
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: lg
        shadow: elevated
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        widthMode: '50'
        gap: md
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: NEW PRODUCT LAUNCH
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#7c3aed'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: See It in Action
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#1e1b4b'
          align: left
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Our revolutionary platform is ready for you. Book a personalized

          demo with our team and discover what''s possible.

          '
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#4b5563'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: calendar
      properties:
        display:
          month: 3
          year: 2026
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Book a Demo
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#7c3aed'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch

metadata.template_description: Titlebar with navigation links, followed by a columnsgrid mega-menu layout with link categories and featured images.
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platforms, enterprise sites, and content-heavy websites needing organized multi-category navigation
metadata.header_base_components: page, titlebar, layout-row, columnsgrid, eyebrow, link, image, heading, paragraph, layout-column, button

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: MEGA-MENU NAVIGATION PATTERN
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#3b82f6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Explore Our Full Product Suite
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: The mega-menu above organizes navigation into categorized columns with
        featured imagery, making it easy for users to discover products, solutions,
        and resources at a glance.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#475569'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: 75
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: button
    properties:
      text: Get Started Free
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#3b82f6'
        radius: md
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: semibold
        size: md
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: xl

metadata.template_description: Titlebar pinned to top with hamburger menu for mobile viewports and scroll shrink behavior.
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS landing pages, corporate sites, and product pages needing persistent top navigation
metadata.header_base_components: page, titlebar, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, layout-row, button, columnsgrid

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#ffffff'
          colorEnd: '#ffffff'
          direction: to bottom
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: STREAMLINED PRODUCTIVITY
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#0ea5e9'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Work Smarter, Not Harder
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#0f172a'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: The all-in-one platform that helps teams collaborate, plan, and ship products
        faster. Scroll down to see the sticky titlebar shrink and follow you.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.7'
      layout:
        widthMode: 75
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        verticalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Start Free Trial
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#0ea5e9'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: semibold
          size: md
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xl
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Watch Demo
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 2
            style: solid
            color: '#0ea5e9'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#0ea5e9'
          weight: semibold
          size: md
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xl
