# Template: The Newsletter Footer | Description: Layout-row footer with newsletter copy on the left and an email signup form on the right, plus a copyright bar. | Section: footer | Layout: grid | Components: page, layout-column, heading, paragraph, layout-row, eyebrow, form, textbox, button, link | Use cases: blogs, media sites, and SaaS products wanting to capture email subscribers in the footer | Visual style: dark_mode
# Theme: primary=#f1f5f9 bg=#ffffff font='Space Grotesk', sans-serif
# Component 1/3
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Newsletter Footer Pattern
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#f1f5f9'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: A dark-themed footer with a newsletter signup form. The left side features
        compelling copy and the right side has an email input with a subscribe button.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#94a3b8'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: 75

metadata.template_description: Layout-row footer with newsletter copy on the left and an email signup form on the right, plus a copyright bar.
metadata.template_use_cases: blogs, media sites, and SaaS products wanting to capture email subscribers in the footer
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, heading, paragraph, layout-row, eyebrow, form, textbox, button, link

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-between
      wrap: wrap
      verticalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xxl
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#f1f5f9'
          colorEnd: '#f1f5f9'
          direction: to bottom right
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: sm
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: STAY IN THE LOOP
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Subscribe to Our Newsletter
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#f1f5f9'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Get the latest insights, tutorials, and product updates delivered straight
          to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#94a3b8'
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Join 25,000+ subscribers
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: medium
            color: '#f59e0b'
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Weekly digest every Friday
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: medium
            color: '#94a3b8'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#f1f5f9'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        border:
          width: 1
          style: solid
          color: '#94a3b8'
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Get Started Today
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f1f5f9'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          direction: column
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email Address
            show: true
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: medium
              color: '#94a3b8'
          field:
            placeholder: you@example.com
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f1f5f9'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 1
              style: solid
              color: '#94a3b8'
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#f1f5f9'
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: First Name (optional)
            show: true
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: medium
              color: '#94a3b8'
          field:
            placeholder: Your first name
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f1f5f9'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 1
              style: solid
              color: '#94a3b8'
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#f1f5f9'
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Subscribe Now
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f59e0b'
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#f1f5f9'
            weight: bold
            size: md
          layout:
            widthMode: stretch
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#94a3b8'
          align: center

metadata.template_description: Branding column with social links alongside a three-column link grid for products, company, and support, plus a copyright bar.
metadata.template_use_cases: technology companies, cloud platforms, and enterprise sites needing comprehensive footer navigation
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, heading, paragraph, layout-row, link, columnsgrid

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: wrap
      verticalAlign: start
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '25'
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Horizon
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#06b6d4'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Building the next generation of cloud infrastructure for modern development
          teams worldwide.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#cbd5e1'
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
      components:
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Twitter
          href: https://twitter.com
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: medium
            color: '#06b6d4'
          appearance:
            underline: false
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: medium
            color: '#06b6d4'
          appearance:
            underline: false
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Discord
          href: https://discord.com
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: medium
            color: '#06b6d4'
          appearance:
            underline: false
  - name: columnsgrid
    properties:
      layout:
        columns: 3
        gap: lg
        verticalAlign: top
      responsive:
        breakpoints:
          md: 2
          sm: 1
    columns:
    - components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Products
          level: 4
          typography:

metadata.template_description: Layout-row of link components separated by slash caption characters showing hierarchical page navigation trails.
metadata.template_use_cases: e-commerce product pages, documentation sites, and multi-level content hierarchies
metadata.header_base_components: page, titlebar, layout-row, link, caption, image, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: nowrap
      verticalAlign: start
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505740420928-5e560c06d30e?w=600&q=80
        altText: Wireless headphones product shot
      appearance:
        minHeight: 25
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: lg
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: ELECTRONICS
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#4f46e5'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Premium Wireless Headphones
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#111827'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Experience crystal-clear audio with active noise cancellation, 40-hour
          battery life, and premium comfort. The breadcrumb above shows the full navigation
          trail from Home to this product page.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#6b7280'
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: $349.99
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Add to Cart
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#4f46e5'
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Save for Later
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 2
              style: solid
              color: '#6b7280'
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#6b7280'
            weight: medium
            size: md
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl

metadata.template_description: Layout-row with four centered buttons styled as a mobile tab bar, with featured content cards and activity list above.
metadata.template_use_cases: mobile app interfaces, progressive web apps, and responsive mobile-first navigation patterns
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, heading, layout-column, image, eyebrow, paragraph, columnsgrid, button

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f2f2f7'
        transparency: 100
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#f2f2f7'
          transparency: 100

        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501594907352-04cda38ebc29?w=500&q=80
          altText: Scenic landscape view
        appearance:
          minHeight: 12.5
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: lg
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: md
      components:
      - name: eyebrow
        properties:
          text: FEATURED
          typography:
            size: xxs
            weight: bold
            color: '#007aff'
            transform: uppercase
            letterSpacing: wider
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Discover New Destinations
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: semibold
            color: '#1c1c1e'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Explore trending travel destinations and local experiences curated
            just for you.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#8e8e93'
            lineHeight: '1.6'
  - name: columnsgrid
    properties:
      layout:
        columns: 2
        gap: sm
        verticalAlign: stretch
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
    columns:
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: md
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f2f2f7'
              transparency: 100
            radius: lg
            shadow: soft
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Nearby
            level: 3
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1c1c1e'
              align: center
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 12 places
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#8e8e93'
              align: center
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: md
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#f2f2f7'
              transparency: 100
            radius: lg
            shadow: soft
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Saved
            level: 3
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1c1c1e'
              align: center
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 8 items
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#8e8e93'
              align: center
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
        marginBlock: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#f2f2f7'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Recent Activity
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#1c1c1e'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Visited Golden Gate Park - 2 hours ago
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#8e8e93'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Saved Fisherman's Wharf - Yesterday
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#8e8e93'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Reviewed Blue Bottle Coffee - 3 days ago
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#8e8e93'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs

metadata.template_description: Two-tier header with a titlebar on top and a search form bar below, followed by category quick links.

content:
- name: image
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1607082348824-0a96f2a4b9da?w=1600&q=80
      altText: Shopping sale banner with colorful bags
    appearance:
      minHeight: 25
      fit: cover
    layout:
      widthMode: stretch
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: xl
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: LIMITED TIME OFFER
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: bold
          color: '#ffffff'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Spring Sale - Up to 70% Off
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Shop thousands of deals across all categories. Free shipping on orders
          over $50.
        typography:
          size: lg
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Shop Now
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#e63946'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
          size: lg
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xxl

metadata.template_description: Tabs component used as primary site navigation with five content sections acting as a single-page site.
metadata.template_use_cases: design studios, creative agencies, and portfolio sites using tab-based single-page navigation
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-row, heading, button, tabs, image, layout-column, eyebrow, paragraph, columnsgrid, link, form, textbox, textarea

content:
- name: tabs
  properties:
    layout:
      orientation: horizontal
      widthMode: stretch
    typography:
      label:
        size: md
        weight: semibold
        active:
          color: '#8b5cf6'
        inactive:
          color: '#475569'
    appearance:
      tab:
        background:
          active: '#fafafa'
          inactive: '#fafafa'
        border:
          width: 3
          style: solid
          position: lower
      content:
        background:
          color: '#fafafa'
          transparency: 100
        border:
          color: '#475569'
          width: 1
          style: solid
        padding:
          block: none
          inline: none
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
  tabs:
  - title: Home
    components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542744173-8e7e53415bb0?w=1600&q=80
          altText: Creative team collaborating in modern office
        appearance:
          minHeight: 30
          fit: cover
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: xxxl
            paddingInline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: AWARD-WINNING DESIGN STUDIO
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: bold
              color: '#475569'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: We Create Digital Experiences That Matter
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxxl
              weight: extrabold
              color: '#fafafa'
              align: center
              letterSpacing: tight
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
            layout:
              widthMode: 75
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: From brand identity to full-scale digital products, we help companies
              stand out in a crowded market.
            typography:
              size: lg
              color: '#475569'
              align: center
            layout:
              widthMode: 75
  - title: Services
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Our Services
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: xxl
            weight: bold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: columnsgrid
        properties:
          layout:
            columns: 3
            gap: lg
            verticalAlign: top
          responsive:
            breakpoints:
              md: 2
              sm: 1
        columns:
        - components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              spacing:
                paddingBlock: lg
                paddingInline: lg
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#fafafa'
                  transparency: 100
                radius: lg
                border:
                  width: 1
                  style: solid
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: Brand Identity
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: lg
                  weight: bold
                  color: '#0f172a'
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Logo design, visual identity systems, brand guidelines, and
                  messaging frameworks that define your unique presence.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
                spacing:
                  marginBlock: sm
            - name: link
              properties:
                text: Learn more
                href: '#branding'
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  weight: semibold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                appearance:
                  underline: false
                  showArrow: true
        - components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              spacing:
                paddingBlock: lg
                paddingInline: lg
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#fafafa'
                  transparency: 100
                radius: lg
                border:
                  width: 1
                  style: solid
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: Web Development
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: lg
                  weight: bold
                  color: '#0f172a'
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Responsive websites, progressive web apps, and e-commerce platforms
                  built with modern technologies for speed and scale.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
                spacing:
                  marginBlock: sm
            - name: link
              properties:
                text: Learn more
                href: '#web'
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  weight: semibold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                appearance:
                  underline: false
                  showArrow: true
        - components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              spacing:
                paddingBlock: lg
                paddingInline: lg
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#fafafa'
                  transparency: 100
                radius: lg
                border:
                  width: 1
                  style: solid
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: UX Strategy
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: lg
                  weight: bold
                  color: '#0f172a'
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: User research, information architecture, wireframing, and prototyping
                  to craft intuitive experiences users love.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
                spacing:
                  marginBlock: sm
            - name: link
              properties:
                text: Learn more
                href: '#ux'
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  weight: semibold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                appearance:
                  underline: false
                  showArrow: true
  - title: Portfolio
    components:
    - name: layout-column

          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Selected Work
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: xxl
            weight: bold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: columnsgrid
        properties:
          layout:
            columns: 2
            gap: lg
            verticalAlign: top
          responsive:
            breakpoints:
              md: 1
              sm: 1
        columns:
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=600&q=80
                altText: Dashboard analytics project
              appearance:
                minHeight: 18.75
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: lg
                hoverEffect: zoom
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Fintech Dashboard Redesign
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: semibold
                color: '#0f172a'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: sm
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Reimagined the analytics experience for 500K+ daily users, resulting
                in 40% better engagement.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#475569'
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586717791821-3f44a563fa4c?w=600&q=80
                altText: Mobile app design project
              appearance:
                minHeight: 18.75
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: lg
                hoverEffect: zoom
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: HealthTrack Mobile App
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: semibold
                color: '#0f172a'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: sm
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: End-to-end design of a health monitoring app downloaded by 2M+
                users across iOS and Android.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#475569'
  - title: About
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: nowrap
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: xl
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c?w=600&q=80
            altText: Design team working together
          appearance:
            minHeight: 25
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: lg
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
          spacing:
            paddingInline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: ABOUT US
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: bold
              color: '#8b5cf6'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: A Team of Creative Problem Solvers
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              color: '#0f172a'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Founded in 2018, Prism Design is a collective of 24 designers, developers,
              and strategists who believe great design drives business growth. We
              work with forward-thinking companies from startups to Fortune 500.
            typography:
              size: md
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.8'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              verticalAlign: center
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
          components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: 150+
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Projects Delivered
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: '24'
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Team Members
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: '12'
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Design Awards
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
  - title: Contact
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: nowrap
          verticalAlign: start
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: xl
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Let's Talk
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              color: '#0f172a'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Fill out the
              form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
            typography:
              size: md
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'Email: hello@prismdesign.co

              Phone: +1 (415) 555-0198

              Address: 123 Design District, San Francisco, CA 94105

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.8'
      - name: form
        properties:
          layout:
            direction: column
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
          submit:
            show: false
        components:
        - name: textbox
          properties:
            label:
              text: Your Name
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: John Smith
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: textbox
          properties:
            label:
              text: Email Address
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: john@company.com
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: textarea
          properties:
            label:
              text: Project Details
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: Tell us about your project...
              rows: 5
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: button
          properties:
            text: Send Message
            appearance:
              background:
                color: '#8b5cf6'
              radius: md
            typography:
              color: '#fafafa'
              weight: semibold
              size: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
              paddingBlock: md
              paddingInline: xl

                  underline: false
                  showArrow: true
        - components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              spacing:
                paddingBlock: lg
                paddingInline: lg
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#fafafa'
                  transparency: 100
                radius: lg
                border:
                  width: 1
                  style: solid
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: UX Strategy
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: lg
                  weight: bold
                  color: '#0f172a'
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: User research, information architecture, wireframing, and prototyping
                  to craft intuitive experiences users love.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
                spacing:
                  marginBlock: sm
            - name: link
              properties:
                text: Learn more
                href: '#ux'
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  weight: semibold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                appearance:
                  underline: false
                  showArrow: true
  - title: Portfolio
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Selected Work
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: xxl
            weight: bold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: columnsgrid
        properties:
          layout:
            columns: 2
            gap: lg
            verticalAlign: top
          responsive:
            breakpoints:
              md: 1
              sm: 1
        columns:
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=600&q=80
                altText: Dashboard analytics project
              appearance:
                minHeight: 18.75
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: lg
                hoverEffect: zoom
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Fintech Dashboard Redesign
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: semibold
                color: '#0f172a'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: sm
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Reimagined the analytics experience for 500K+ daily users, resulting
                in 40% better engagement.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#475569'
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586717791821-3f44a563fa4c?w=600&q=80
                altText: Mobile app design project
              appearance:
                minHeight: 18.75
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: lg
                hoverEffect: zoom
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: HealthTrack Mobile App
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: semibold
                color: '#0f172a'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: sm
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: End-to-end design of a health monitoring app downloaded by 2M+
                users across iOS and Android.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#475569'
  - title: About
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: nowrap
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: xl
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c?w=600&q=80
            altText: Design team working together
          appearance:
            minHeight: 25
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: lg
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
          spacing:
            paddingInline: xl
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: ABOUT US
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: bold
              color: '#8b5cf6'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: A Team of Creative Problem Solvers
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              color: '#0f172a'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Founded in 2018, Prism Design is a collective of 24 designers, developers,
              and strategists who believe great design drives business growth. We
              work with forward-thinking companies from startups to Fortune 500.
            typography:
              size: md
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.8'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              verticalAlign: center
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
          components:
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: 150+
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Projects Delivered
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: '24'
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Team Members
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: '12'
                level: 3
                typography:
                  size: xxl
                  weight: extrabold
                  color: '#8b5cf6'
                  align: center
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Design Awards
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#475569'
                  align: center
  - title: Contact
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: nowrap
          verticalAlign: start
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: xl
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
        components:
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Let's Talk
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              color: '#0f172a'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Fill out the
              form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
            typography:
              size: md
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'Email: hello@prismdesign.co

              Phone: +1 (415) 555-0198

              Address: 123 Design District, San Francisco, CA 94105

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#475569'
              lineHeight: '1.8'
      - name: form
        properties:
          layout:
            direction: column
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            widthMode: '50'
          submit:
            show: false
        components:
        - name: textbox
          properties:
            label:
              text: Your Name
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: John Smith
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: textbox
          properties:
            label:
              text: Email Address
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: john@company.com
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: textarea
          properties:
            label:
              text: Project Details
              show: true
              typography:
                size: sm
                weight: medium
                color: '#0f172a'
            field:
              placeholder: Tell us about your project...
              rows: 5
            appearance:
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: '#475569'
              radius: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: button
          properties:
            text: Send Message
            appearance:
              background:
                color: '#8b5cf6'
              radius: md
            typography:
              color: '#fafafa'
              weight: semibold
              size: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
              paddingBlock: md
              paddingInline: xl

          paddingInline: md

              color: '#ffffff'
              weight: semibold
              size: md
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: sm

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#0f172a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: center
        widthMode: '66'
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: Urban Exploration
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          align: center
          color: '#818cf8'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wide
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Dubai City Skyline
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Scroll through this stunning panoramic view of Dubai's iconic skyline,
          featuring the towering Burj Khalifa and the glittering cityscape along the
          waterfront.
        typography:
          size: md
          align: center
          color: '#94a3b8'

      stepDistance: 400

      shadow: dramatic

metadata.template_title: City Skyline Panorama Gallery with Interactive Navigation
metadata.template_description: Dark-themed immersive panoramic viewer showcasing Dubai's skyline with drag-to-explore and arrow navigation, featuring an eyebrow/heading/description header, dramatic shadow styling, and a three-column instruction grid with icons explaining interaction modes
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: center
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 3
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#1e293b'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: eye
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Drag to Explore
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Click and drag left or right to pan across the panoramic image.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#94a3b8'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: arrow-left
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Arrow Navigation
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Use the left and right arrow buttons overlaid on the image for precise
          scrolling.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#94a3b8'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: settings
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Initial Position
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: This panorama starts centered, showing the middle of the skyline first.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#94a3b8'

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 4
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: center
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#ffffff'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 350
        suffix: +
        duration: 2000
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Premium Stores
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 5
        duration: 1500
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Shopping Levels
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 50
        suffix: +
        duration: 1800
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Dining Options
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 12
        prefix: ''
        suffix: K
        duration: 2200
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Parking Spaces
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'

# Source: 03_theater_auditorium.yaml | Page: unknown
# Template: Theater Auditorium Panorama with Show Times and Booking | Description: Dark warm-themed Art Deco theater panoramic viewer with gold accent borders, an Arthur Miller blockquote, and a three-column show schedule grid featuring eyebrow dates, show titles, times, and Book Tickets buttons | Section: gallery | Layout: stacked | Components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, br, blockquote, columnsgrid, button | Use cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall | Visual style: dark_mode
# Theme: primary=#fef3c7 bg=#1a0a0a font='Inter', sans-serif
# Component 3/4
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#1a0a0a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '75'
        gap: md
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: br
      properties:
        type: solid
        color: '#92400e'
        thickness: 1
    - name: blockquote
      properties:
        quote: 'The theater is so endlessly fascinating because it is so accidental.

          It is so much like life.

          '
        cite: Arthur Miller
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#fef3c7'
        appearance:
          border:
            accentColor: '#f59e0b'
          background:
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: md

metadata.template_title: Theater Auditorium Panorama with Show Times and Booking
metadata.template_description: Dark warm-themed Art Deco theater panoramic viewer with gold accent borders, an Arthur Miller blockquote, and a three-column show schedule grid featuring eyebrow dates, show titles, times, and Book Tickets buttons
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, br, blockquote, columnsgrid, button

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: stretch
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 3
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#2a1515'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: This Friday
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          align: center
          transform: uppercase
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Phantom
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#fef3c7'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 7:30 PM - Orchestra & Balcony
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#d4a574'
          align: center
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Book Tickets
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#92400e'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 0
            style: none
            color: '#92400e'
          radius: sm
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          color: '#fef3c7'
  - components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: This Saturday
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          align: center
          transform: uppercase
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Swan Lake
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#fef3c7'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 8:00 PM - All Sections
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#d4a574'
          align: center
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Book Tickets
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#92400e'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 0
            style: none
            color: '#92400e'
          radius: sm
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          color: '#fef3c7'
  - components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: Next Week
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          align: center
          transform: uppercase
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Jazz Night
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#fef3c7'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 9:00 PM - Intimate Setting
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#d4a574'
          align: center
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Book Tickets
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#92400e'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 0
            style: none
            color: '#92400e'
          radius: sm
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          color: '#fef3c7'

metadata.template_title: Street Market Panorama with Vendor Highlights and Ratings
metadata.template_description: Warm amber-themed bustling market panoramic viewer with golden border styling, a four-column highlights grid featuring icons, descriptions, and star ratings for produce/crafts/food/music, plus visiting hours and Get Directions CTA
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, columnsgrid, icon, rating, button

content:
- name: panorama-display
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/30709459/pexels-photo-30709459.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=3000&h=600&fit=crop
      altText: Panoramic view of a vibrant street market with vendors and shoppers
    behavior:
      initialPosition: left
      autoScroll: false
      stepDistance: 300
      pauseOnHover: true
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
    appearance:
      radius: lg
      shadow: soft
      shadowColor: '#92400e'
      border:
        width: 3
        style: solid
        color: '#fbbf24'

metadata.template_title: Street Market Panorama with Vendor Highlights and Ratings
metadata.template_description: Warm amber-themed bustling market panoramic viewer with golden border styling, a four-column highlights grid featuring icons, descriptions, and star ratings for produce/crafts/food/music, plus visiting hours and Get Directions CTA
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, columnsgrid, icon, rating, button

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 4
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: stretch
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#ffffff'
      columnRadius: lg
    spacing:
      marginBlock: md
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: leaf
        size: '36'
        color: '#16a34a'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Fresh Produce
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#451a03'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Locally sourced fruits, vegetables, and herbs picked fresh daily from
          nearby farms.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#78350f'
    - name: rating
      properties:
        value: 5
        iconType: star
        color: '#f59e0b'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: shopping-bag
        size: '36'
        color: '#9333ea'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Artisan Crafts
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#451a03'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Handmade jewelry, pottery, textiles, and unique souvenirs from local
          artisans.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#78350f'
    - name: rating
      properties:
        value: 4.5
        iconType: star
        color: '#f59e0b'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: coffee
        size: '36'
        color: '#b45309'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Street Food
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#451a03'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Savor authentic local cuisine from sizzling grills, spice stalls, and
          bakery stands.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#78350f'
    - name: rating
      properties:
        value: 4.5
        iconType: star
        color: '#f59e0b'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: music
        size: '36'
        color: '#e11d48'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Live Music
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#451a03'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Street performers and local musicians add rhythm and life to the market
          atmosphere.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#78350f'
    - name: rating
      properties:
        value: 4
        iconType: star
        color: '#f59e0b'

metadata.template_title: Mountain Landscape Panorama with Trail Guides and Difficulty Bars
metadata.template_description: Green nature-themed dual panoramic mountain viewer with trail info cards featuring icons, difficulty progress bars, and captions for summit/valley/glacier routes, plus a dark-background Book a Tour CTA section
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, columnsgrid, icon, progress-bar, caption, button

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: lg
      verticalAlign: stretch
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 3
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#ffffff'
      columnRadius: lg
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: map-pin
        size: '36'
        color: '#15803d'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Summit Trail
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#14532d'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 12.5 km round trip to the highest peak. Moderate difficulty with stunning
          ridge views.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#166534'
    - name: progress-bar
      properties:
        percent: 65
        thickness: medium
        color: '#22c55e'
        trackColor: '#dcfce7'
        appearance:
          radius: pill
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: Difficulty - Moderate
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#166534'
          align: left
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: map-pin
        size: '36'
        color: '#15803d'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Valley Loop
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#14532d'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 8 km gentle loop through wildflower meadows and along the river. Family
          friendly.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#166534'
    - name: progress-bar
      properties:
        percent: 30
        thickness: medium
        color: '#22c55e'
        trackColor: '#dcfce7'
        appearance:
          radius: pill
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: Difficulty - Easy
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#166534'
          align: left
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: map-pin
        size: '36'
        color: '#15803d'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Glacier Route
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#14532d'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 18 km advanced trek to the glacier face. Requires experience and proper
          equipment.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#166534'
    - name: progress-bar
      properties:
        percent: 90
        thickness: medium
        color: '#ef4444'
        trackColor: '#fecaca'
        appearance:
          radius: pill
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: Difficulty - Hard
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#dc2626'
          align: left

metadata.template_description: Image component with a nested layout-column overlay showing heading text. Dark tint overlay reveals project details on the image.
metadata.template_use_cases: agencies, freelancers, photographers, creatives, portfolios
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, columnsgrid, image, link

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: lg
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561070791-2526d30994b5?w=800&q=80
          altText: Brand identity design project with logo concepts and color palettes
        appearance:
          minHeight: 25
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: lg
          hoverEffect: zoom
          overlay:
            enabled: true
            color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.7)
            opacity: 70
          shadow: soft
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: BRAND IDENTITY
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Luminary Studios
            level: 3
            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#f8fafc'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xs
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Complete brand overhaul including logo design, color system, and
              visual identity guidelines for a creative agency.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#334155'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: View Case Study
            href: '#luminary'
            appearance:
              color: '#6366f1'
              underline: false
              showArrow: true
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&q=80
          altText: Web application dashboard design with data visualizations
        appearance:
          minHeight: 25
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: lg
          hoverEffect: zoom
          overlay:
            enabled: true
            color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.7)
            opacity: 70
          shadow: soft
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: WEB APPLICATION
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: DataPulse Analytics
            level: 3
            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#f8fafc'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xs
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Real-time analytics dashboard with intuitive data visualization,
              custom reporting, and collaborative features.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#334155'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: View Case Study
            href: '#datapulse'
            appearance:
              color: '#6366f1'
              underline: false
              showArrow: true
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85f82e?w=800&q=80
          altText: Creative photography portfolio with dramatic lighting
        appearance:

          fit: cover

          hoverEffect: zoom
          overlay:
            enabled: true
            color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.7)
            opacity: 70
          shadow: soft
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: PHOTOGRAPHY
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              color: '#6366f1'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Urban Horizons
            level: 3
            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#f8fafc'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xs
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Cinematic urban photography series exploring light, shadow, and
              architecture across major world cities.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#334155'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: View Case Study
            href: '#urban'
            appearance:
              color: '#6366f1'
              underline: false
              showArrow: true

- name: columnsgrid

    layout:
      columns: 2
      gap: xl
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 1
        sm: 1
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: stretch
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f0f0f3'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: elevated
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: none
      components:
      - name: video
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
          appearance:
            aspectRatio: 16/9
            height: 320
          playback:
            controls: false
            autoplay: false
            muted: true
            loop: true
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:

          properties:

              weight: semibold

              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wider

          properties:

            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#1a1a2e'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: xs
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: A high-energy commercial spot featuring dynamic athletes and cutting-edge
              visual effects. Shot on location in Barcelona with a crew of 45.
            typography:

metadata.template_description: Columnsgrid with 3 columns where each card is a simple image and caption. Different images with varying aspect ratios for a masonry-like effect.
metadata.template_use_cases: agencies, freelancers, photographers, creatives, portfolios

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#8b5cf6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Our Clients
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#111827'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: We have been privileged to work with some of the most recognized brands
        in the world.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#374151'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'

metadata.template_description: Carousel that shows brand logo images in a sliding carousel. Clean presentation of client logos with autoplay.

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: carousel
    properties:
      behavior:
        autoplay: true
        delay: 3000
        loop: true
        pauseOnHover: true
        swipeEnabled: true
        swipeThreshold: 50
        keyboardNavigation: true
      animation:
        effect: slide
        duration: 600
      navigation:
        showArrows: true
        arrowStyle: minimal
        arrowPosition: outside
        showDots: true
      indicators:
        style: dots
        position: bottom
      accessibility:
        showPauseButton: true
        ariaLabel: Client logo carousel
      appearance:
        shadow: none
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    slides:
    - components:
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            verticalAlign: center
            gap: xl
            wrap: nowrap
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: md
