# Template: 04 - The Client Logo Slide | Description: Carousel that shows brand logo images in a sliding carousel. Clean presentation of client logos with autoplay. | Section: gallery | Layout: stacked | Components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, carousel, layout-row, image, columnsgrid | Use cases: agencies, freelancers, photographers, creatives, portfolios | Visual style: minimal
# Theme: primary=#111827 bg=#ffffff font='Outfit', sans-serif
# Component 3/3
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 4
      gap: lg
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 2
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#111827'
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: 120+
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Clients Worldwide
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#374151'
          align: center
  - components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: 350+
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Projects Delivered
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#374151'
          align: center
  - components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: '15'
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Years Experience
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#374151'
          align: center
  - components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: 98%
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#8b5cf6'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Client Retention
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#374151'
          align: center

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fffbf0'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: CLIENT STORIES
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#d97706'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading

      level: 1

        color: '#1b1b1b'

        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph

      text: Real words from the teams we have partnered with on transformative projects.

        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'

metadata.template_description: Layout-row with 50% image and 50% blockquote (client quote about the project). Side-by-side split layout showcasing project visuals paired with testimonials.
metadata.template_use_cases: agencies, freelancers, photographers, creatives, portfolios
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, layout-row, image, blockquote, link

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: stretch
      verticalAlign: stretch
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: none
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=900&q=80
        altText: Modern office workspace with collaborative team environment
      appearance:
        fit: cover
        minHeight: 30
        hoverEffect: zoom
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        widthMode: '50'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxl
        paddingInline: xl
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#1b1b1b'
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: FINTECH REBRAND
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#d97706'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: blockquote
      properties:
        quote: The team completely reimagined our brand identity. The new visual system
          has been instrumental in our Series B fundraise - investors immediately
          noticed the elevated professionalism.
        cite: Sarah Chen, CEO at NovaPay
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: medium
          color: '#fffbf0'
        appearance:
          border:
            accentColor: '#d97706'
          background:
            color: '#323232'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          verticalAlign: center
          gap: sm
      components:
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: View Full Case Study
          href: '#novapay'
          appearance:
            color: '#d97706'
            underline: false
            showArrow: true

metadata.template_description: Layout-column with heading and a layout-row of small image icons representing software/technology logos used in projects.
metadata.template_use_cases: agencies, freelancers, photographers, creatives, portfolios
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, columnsgrid, layout-row, image, caption, br

content:
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: lg
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f1f5f9'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
          border:
            width: 1
            style: solid
            color: '#475569'
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Frontend
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Modern frameworks and libraries for building responsive, performant
            user interfaces.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#475569'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            verticalAlign: center
            gap: md
            wrap: wrap
        components:
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1633356122102-3fe601e05bd2?w=80&h=80&fit=crop
              altText: React logo
            appearance:
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
              aspectRatio: 1/1
            layout:
              widthMode: '16'
        - name: image

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fafaf9'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: MEASURABLE IMPACT
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#10b981'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Results That Speak
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#0c0a09'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Every project is measured by the impact it delivers. Here are the numbers
        behind our recent work.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#57534e'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'

            size: lg

            size: xxxl

            letterSpacing: tight

      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Social Media Engagement

          typography:
            size: lg

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: tabs
    properties:
      layout:
        orientation: horizontal
        widthMode: stretch
      typography:
        label:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          active:
            color: '#ec4899'
          inactive:
            color: '#52525b'
      appearance:
        tab:
          background:
            active: '#fafafa'
            inactive: '#52525b'
          border:
            width: 3
            style: solid
            position: lower
        content:
          background:
            color: '#fafafa'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            color: '#52525b'
            width: 1
            style: solid
          padding:
            block: lg
            inline: lg
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    tabs:
    - title: Branding
      components:
      - name: columnsgrid
        properties:
          layout:
            columns: 3
            gap: md
          responsive:
            breakpoints:
              md: 2
              sm: 1
        columns:
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561070791-2526d30994b5?w=600&q=80
                altText: Brand identity mockup with business cards and letterhead
              appearance:
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: md
                hoverEffect: lift
                shadow: soft
                aspectRatio: 4/3
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Luminary Studios
              level: 4
              typography:
                size: md
                weight: semibold
                color: '#18181b'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: xs
          - name: caption
            properties:
              text: Brand Identity / Logo System
              typography:
                size: xs
                color: '#52525b'
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586717791821-3f44a563fa4c?w=600&q=80
                altText: Packaging design with botanical elements
              appearance:
                fit: cover
                cornerStyle: md
                hoverEffect: lift
                shadow: soft
                aspectRatio: 4/3
              layout:
                widthMode: stretch
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Terra Organics
              level: 4
              typography:
                size: md
                weight: semibold
                color: '#18181b'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: xs
          - name: caption
            properties:
              text: Packaging / Brand Guidelines
              typography:
                size: xs
                color: '#52525b'
        - components:
          - name: image
            properties:
              source:
                url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558591710-4b4a1ae0f04d?w=600&q=80
                altText: Minimalist typographic poster series
              appearance:
                fit: cover

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: LEADERSHIP
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#64748b'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: columnsgrid
    properties:
      layout:
        columns: 3
        gap: xl
      responsive:
        breakpoints:
          md: 2
          sm: 1
    columns:
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: md
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            radius: lg
            shadow: soft
        components:

          properties:
            source:

            appearance:
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: pill
              aspectRatio: 1/1
              hoverEffect: lift
              shadow: soft

              widthMode: '50'
        - name: heading
          properties:

            level: 3

            level: 3

              align: center
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: eyebrow

metadata.template_description: Layout-row using gif icons to explain a 3-step workflow. Each step has a gif, heading, and description.
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS, tech, services
metadata.header_base_components: page, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, layout-row, gif, br, caption, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      verticalAlign: top
      wrap: wrap
      gap: lg
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fefce8'
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '33'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: pill
      components:
      - name: gif
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://media.giphy.com/media/3oKIPnAiaMCws8nOsE/giphy.gif
            altText: Animated magnifying glass representing the discovery phase
          appearance:
            fit: contain
            aspectRatio: 1/1
            cornerStyle: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
    - name: br
      properties:
        size: sm
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: STEP 01
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Discover
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f0f0f'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We immerse ourselves in your world. Through stakeholder interviews,
          competitive audits, and user research, we uncover the insights that drive
          strategy.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#525252'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: md
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Stakeholder Workshops
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Competitive Analysis
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: User Research & Personas
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Strategy & Brief
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '33'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: pill
      components:
      - name: gif
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://media.giphy.com/media/l46Cy1rHbQ92uuLXa/giphy.gif
            altText: Animated paintbrush representing the design phase
          appearance:
            fit: contain
            aspectRatio: 1/1
            cornerStyle: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
    - name: br
      properties:
        size: sm
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: STEP 02
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Design
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f0f0f'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Ideas take shape through rapid prototyping and iterative design. We
          explore multiple directions before refining the one that resonates most.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#525252'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: md
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Wireframes & Concepts
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Visual Design Exploration
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Interactive Prototypes
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Design System Creation
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '33'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: pill
      components:
      - name: gif
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://media.giphy.com/media/26AHONQ79FdWZhAI0/giphy.gif
            altText: Animated rocket launch representing the delivery phase
          appearance:
            fit: contain
            aspectRatio: 1/1
            cornerStyle: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
    - name: br
      properties:
        size: sm
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: STEP 03
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Deliver
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f0f0f'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Pixel-perfect execution meets engineering excellence. We build, test,
          and launch with meticulous attention to every detail.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#525252'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fefce8'
          radius: md
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Development & Build
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: QA & User Testing
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Launch & Deployment
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: Handoff & Support
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: medium
            color: '#0f0f0f'

content:

      shadow: soft

    properties:

        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: none
        widthMode: '50'

        size: xxs

        letterSpacing: wider

    properties:

      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#ffffff'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Tailored solutions for organizations with 100+ users
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#94a3b8'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#0f172a'
          transparency: 100
        radius: md
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Dedicated account manager
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#ffffff'

          marginBlock: xxs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Custom SLA & uptime guarantees

          size: sm

        text: Unlimited seats & storage

  - name: br

  - name: button
    properties:
      text: Talk to Sales

        background:
          color: '#3b82f6'
        radius: md
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: bold

        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: xl

        marginBlock: xs

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: medium
      border:
        width: 1
        style: solid
        color: '#64748b'
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Pay Per Seat
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: bold
        color: '#0f172a'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Only pay for what you need. Adjust your team size anytime.
      typography:
        size: sm
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: md
        border:
          width: 1
          style: solid
          color: '#64748b'
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: Number of team members
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#64748b'
          align: center
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wide
    - name: textbox
      properties:
        label:
          text: ''
          show: false
        field:
          placeholder: '10'
          value: '10'
        appearance:
          border:
            width: 2
            style: solid
            color: '#3b82f6'
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: md
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#0f172a'
          align: center
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: xxs
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: $120
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#3b82f6'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: per month ($12/user)
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#64748b'
          align: center
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: xs
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-between
        verticalAlign: center
        gap: sm
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: sm
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: sm
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 10 users x $12/user
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#64748b'
        layout:
          widthMode: '50'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: $120.00/mo
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#2B2F3B'
          align: right
        layout:
          widthMode: '50'
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: md
  - name: button
    properties:
      text: Start with 10 Users
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#3b82f6'
        radius: md
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: bold
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
  - name: caption
    properties:
      text: Volume discounts available for 50+ users
      typography:
        size: xs
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xs

metadata.template_title: Pricing Card Variant: The Value Stack

metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS, subscriptions, memberships, services, ecommerce

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: xl
      shadow: medium
      border:
        width: 1

    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553729459-uj0f8crnrtp0?w=120&h=120&fit=crop
        alt: Premium tier icon
      appearance:
        aspectRatio: 1/1
        radius: pill
        shadow: soft
        objectPosition: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '25'
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: xs
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: PREMIUM TIER
      typography:
        size: xxs
        weight: bold
        color: '#8b5cf6'
        align: center
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xxs
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Scale
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e1b4b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: xxs
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: $149/mo
      level: 3
      typography:
        size: xl
        weight: bold
        color: '#8b5cf6'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: xs
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Built for high-growth teams that need advanced automation, dedicated infrastructure,

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'

    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: none

  components:
  - name: gif
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://media.giphy.com/media/xT9IgzoKnwFNmISR8I/giphy.gif
        altText: Product feature animation
      appearance:
        minHeight: 15
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Smart Fitness Tracker Pro
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Advanced health monitoring with 7-day battery life and water resistance
          up to 50m.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.6'
    - name: accordion
      properties:
        behavior:
          allowMultipleOpen: false
        typography:
          title:
            size: sm
            weight: semibold
            color: '#111827'
          content:
            size: sm
            weight: regular
            color: '#6b7280'

          titleBackground:
            color: '#ffffff'
          border:
            width: 1
            style: solid
            color: '#6b7280'
            position: bottom
          radius: sm
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm

      - title: Display & Design

              '

        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '7-day typical usage battery life

              Full charge in 65 minutes

              '
      - title: Sensors & Tracking
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'Heart rate, SpO2, Stress monitoring

              GPS + GLONASS + Galileo

              100+ workout modes

              '
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: $349.99
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Buy Now
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#2563eb'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: semibold
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch

        radius: md

      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: 'CloudSync, a B2B SaaS company with 500+ enterprise clients, was struggling
            with

            customer churn. Their onboarding process required multiple handoffs between
            teams

            and manual configuration steps that often took 2+ weeks to complete.


            After implementing our platform, they automated 80% of the onboarding
            workflow,

            reduced configuration from days to hours, and saw their NPS score jump
            from 32 to 71

            within the first quarter.


            Key wins included: automated environment provisioning, self-service configuration

            wizards, and real-time progress tracking for both the customer and internal
            teams.

            weight: semibold
            color: '#059669'

            showArrow: true
            underline: false

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: left
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: soft
      border:
        width: 1
        style: solid
        color: '#6b7280'
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-between
        verticalAlign: center
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Exceeded All My Expectations
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: VERIFIED PURCHASE
        typography:
          size: xxs
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          paddingBlock: xxs
          paddingInline: xs
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: pill
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: 'I''ve been using this product daily for the past 6 months and it has

        fundamentally changed how I approach my work. The initial setup was

        incredibly straightforward — I was up and running in under 15 minutes.


        The feature set is comprehensive without being overwhelming. Every tool

        feels purposeful and well-designed. The AI-powered suggestions have

        saved me countless hours, and the collaboration features make working

        with my distributed team feel seamless.


        If I had to pick one area for improvement, it would be the mobile

        experience — while functional, it doesn''t quite match the desktop

        polish. That said, updates are frequent and I''ve noticed improvements

        with each release.

        '
      typography:
        size: sm
        color: '#6b7280'
        align: left
        lineHeight: '1.8'
  - name: br
    properties:
      size: sm
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-between
        verticalAlign: center
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          verticalAlign: center
          gap: sm
          wrap: nowrap
        appearance:
          background:
            transparency: 0
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?w=80
            altText: Reviewer avatar
          appearance:
            minHeight: 2.5
            maxHeight: 2.5
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: fit
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
            gap: none
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Thomas Bradley
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: bold
              color: '#2C3039'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: Purchased Feb 2026
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
    - name: link
      properties:
        text: Helpful (47)
        href: '#'
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          color: '#6b7280'
        appearance:
          underline: false
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: MARCH 15, 2026
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#0052CC'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Event Schedule
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: semibold
        color: '#1E3A5F'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: A full day of inspiring talks, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.7'
      layout:
        widthMode: 66
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md

metadata.template_title: Event Schedule - Conference Day Agenda with Accordion
metadata.template_description: A conference schedule section with time-slot accordion items showing speaker, description, and location details
metadata.template_use_cases: dental clinic, salon, barbershop, yoga studio, fitness studio, conference, workshop, tutoring center, cooking class, music school
metadata.header_base_components: layout-column, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, accordion, icon, badge

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: accordion
    properties:
      behavior:
        allowMultiple: false
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#E8EDF2'
          transparency: 100
        border:
          width: 1
          style: solid
          color: '#C5D4E3'
        radius: sm
      typography:
        title:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#1E3A5F'
    items:
    - title: 9:00 AM — Registration & Welcome Coffee
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: coffee
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Check in at the registration desk, grab your badge and welcome kit,
              and enjoy coffee and pastries in the main lobby.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Main Lobby'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium
    - title: '10:00 AM — Opening Keynote: The Future of Technology'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: mic
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Dr. Sarah Chen
            level: 4
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1E3A5F'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Explore the emerging trends shaping our industry over the next decade,
              from AI-driven automation to sustainable computing practices.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Grand Ballroom | Duration: 60 min'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium
    - title: '11:30 AM — Workshop: Building Scalable Systems'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: code
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Marcus Rodriguez
            level: 4
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1E3A5F'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: A hands-on workshop covering distributed architecture patterns,
              load balancing strategies, and real-world case studies from high-traffic
              platforms.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: badge
          properties:
            text: Hands-On
            appearance:
              background:
                color: '#0052CC'
              radius: pill
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Workshop Room A | Duration: 90 min'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium
    - title: 1:00 PM — Lunch & Networking
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: users
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Enjoy a catered lunch while connecting with fellow attendees, speakers,
              and sponsors. Topic tables available for focused discussions.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Dining Hall | Duration: 60 min'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium
    - title: '2:30 PM — Panel: AI in Practice'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: message-circle
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Industry leaders discuss real-world AI implementations, ethical
              considerations, and practical strategies for integrating machine learning
              into existing workflows.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Grand Ballroom | Duration: 75 min'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium
    - title: 4:00 PM — Closing Remarks & Happy Hour
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout: {}
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: sm
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: award
            size: 24
            color: '#0052CC'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Wrap up the day with key takeaways, prize drawings, and an informal
              happy hour to celebrate a day of learning and connection.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: 'Location: Rooftop Terrace'
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#0052CC'
              weight: medium

metadata.template_title: Class Timetable - Weekly Course Schedule with Tabs
metadata.template_description: A weekly timetable using tabs for each day, with columnsgrid showing class times, names, and instructors
metadata.template_use_cases: dental clinic, salon, barbershop, yoga studio, fitness studio, conference, workshop, tutoring center, cooking class, music school
metadata.header_base_components: layout-column, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, caption, tabs, columnsgrid

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    appearance: null
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: BOOK YOUR VISIT
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#3182CE'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Available Appointments
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: bold
        color: '#1A365D'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Select a convenient time slot below. Same-day and next-day appointments
        are subject to availability.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#314259'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.7'
      layout:
        widthMode: 66

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: left
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: soft
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1485827404703-89b55fcc595e?w=800
        altText: AI and robotics
      appearance:
        minHeight: 18
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
        hoverEffect: zoom
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: TECHNOLOGY
        typography:
          size: xxs
          weight: bold
          color: '#2563eb'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Future of AI-Powered Design Systems
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.3'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'How machine learning is reshaping the way we think about

          user interfaces and design workflows. A deep dive into

          the tools that are changing everything.

          '
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-between
          verticalAlign: center
          wrap: nowrap
        appearance:
          background:
            transparency: 0
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: 5 min read
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6b7280'
      - name: link
        properties:
          text: Read Article
          href: '#'
          typography:
            size: sm
            weight: semibold
            color: '#2563eb'
          appearance:
            showArrow: true
            underline: false
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: medium
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: gif
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://media.giphy.com/media/ZVik7pBtu9dNS/giphy.gif
        altText: Data visualization animation
      appearance:
        minHeight: 15
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: DATA SCIENCE
        typography:
          size: xxs
          weight: bold
          color: '#7c3aed'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Understanding Neural Networks in Plain English
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'A visual guide to how neural networks learn, adapt, and make

          predictions — no PhD required. We break down the most complex

          concepts into bite-sized, understandable pieces.

          '
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: accordion
      properties:
        behavior:
          allowMultipleOpen: true
        typography:
          title:
            size: sm
            weight: semibold
            color: '#7c3aed'
          content:
            size: sm
            weight: regular
            color: '#6b7280'
        appearance:
          titleBackground:
            color: '#ffffff'
          border:
            width: 1
            style: solid
            color: '#7c3aed'
            position: bottom
          radius: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
      items:
      - title: Key Takeaways
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '1. Neural networks mimic biological brain connections

              2. Training is just repeated error correction at massive scale

              3. Deep learning = many hidden layers = more abstraction

              4. Transfer learning lets you reuse trained models

              5. The real magic is in the data, not the architecture

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#6b7280'
              lineHeight: '1.8'
      - title: Related Resources
        components:
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: Interactive Playground - TensorFlow
            href: '#'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#7c3aed'
            appearance:
              showArrow: true
              underline: false
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: Beginner's Guide to Machine Learning
            href: '#'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#7c3aed'
            appearance:
              showArrow: true
              underline: false
    - name: caption
      properties:
        text: By Dr. Sarah Kim - 12 min read - Feb 2026
        typography:
          size: xs
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: left

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: left
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: soft
      border:
        width: 1
        style: solid
        color: '#6b7280'
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499750310107-5fef28a66643?w=800
        altText: Coffee and laptop on a table
      appearance:
        minHeight: 14
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
        hoverEffect: zoom
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: xs
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          verticalAlign: center
          gap: sm
          wrap: nowrap
        appearance:
          background:
            transparency: 0
      components:
      - name: eyebrow
        properties:
          text: LIFESTYLE
          typography:
            size: xxs
            weight: bold
            color: '#059669'
            transform: uppercase
            letterSpacing: wider
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: 5 min read
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6b7280'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Morning Routine That Changed My Productivity
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#111827'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.3'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph

        text: 'How waking up 30 minutes earlier and following a simple

          '

          size: sm
          color: '#6b7280'
          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.6'

          verticalAlign: center

        appearance:

            transparency: 0
      components:
      - name: image

          source:
            url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=80
            altText: Author avatar
          appearance:
            minHeight: 2
            maxHeight: 2
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: pill
          layout:
            widthMode: fit
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: By Emily Carter - Feb 8, 2026
          typography:
            size: xs
            color: '#6b7280'

metadata.template_title: Story Card Variant: The Floating Header

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: sm
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
      radius: lg
      shadow: medium
      border:
        width: 1
        style: solid
        color: '#6b7280'
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      marginInline: lg
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: 3-PART SERIES
      typography:
        size: xxs
        weight: bold
        color: '#dc2626'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: pill
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxs
        paddingInline: sm
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: 'Mastering Modern CSS: From Basics to Brilliance'
      level: 3
      typography:
        size: xl
        weight: bold
        color: '#111827'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: A comprehensive journey through CSS Grid, Flexbox, and Custom Properties.
      typography:
        size: sm
        color: '#6b7280'
        align: center
  - name: tabs
    properties:
      layout:
        orientation: horizontal
        widthMode: stretch
      typography:
        label:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          active:
            color: '#dc2626'
          inactive:
            color: '#6b7280'
      appearance:
        tab:
          background:
            active: '#ffffff'
            inactive: '#ffffff'
          border:
            width: 2
            style: solid
            position: lower
        content:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          border:
            color: '#6b7280'
            width: 1
            style: solid
          padding:
            block: md
            inline: md
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
    tabs:
    - title: 'Part 1: Foundations'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507721999472-8ed4421c4af2?w=600
              altText: Code on screen
            appearance:
              minHeight: 10
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'Learn the fundamentals of CSS layout. We cover the box model,

              positioning, and how modern browsers render your styles. This

              foundation is critical for everything that follows.

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#6b7280'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: Read Part 1
            href: '#'
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#dc2626'
            appearance:
              showArrow: true
              underline: false
    - title: 'Part 2: Flexbox & Grid'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555066931-4365d14bab8c?w=600
              altText: Grid layout code
            appearance:
              minHeight: 10
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'Dive deep into Flexbox for one-dimensional layouts and CSS Grid

              for two-dimensional mastery. Real-world examples from production

              websites you use every day.

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#6b7280'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: Read Part 2
            href: '#'
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#dc2626'
            appearance:
              showArrow: true
              underline: false
    - title: 'Part 3: Advanced'
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: left
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: image
          properties:
            source:
              url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1461749280684-dccba630e2f6?w=600
              altText: Advanced coding
            appearance:
              minHeight: 10
              fit: cover
              cornerStyle: md
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: 'CSS Custom Properties, Container Queries, and the new @layer

              at-rule. We explore the cutting edge of CSS that will define

              how we build layouts in 2026 and beyond.

              '
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#6b7280'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
        - name: link
          properties:
            text: Read Part 3
            href: '#'
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#dc2626'
            appearance:
              showArrow: true
              underline: false

metadata.template_description: Frosted glass cards floating over a vibrant gradient background
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, creative portfolio, fashion brand, design studio, tech startup, luxury brand, photography studio, music platform
metadata.header_base_components: site, page, layout-row, layout-column, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      wrap: wrap
      verticalAlign: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      tag: section
      gap: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
    appearance:
      background:
        type: ''
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 0
      blur: false
      border:
        width: 0
        style: solid
        color: '#000000'
      radius: none
      shadow: none
      shadowColor: '#000000'
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        gap: md
      appearance: null
      spacing:
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: Platform
        typography:
          color: '#0052CC'
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          letterSpacing: wider
          transform: uppercase
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The simplest way to manage your workflow
        level: 1
        typography:
          color: '#1E3A5F'
          size: xxl
          weight: semibold
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: snug
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Streamline your team''s processes with an intuitive platform

          designed for clarity and efficiency. No clutter, just results.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#6b7280'
          size: md
          weight: regular
          lineHeight: relaxed
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          verticalAlign: center
          wrap: wrap
          gap: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
      components:
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Start Free Trial
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#0052CC'
              transparency: 100
            border:
              width: 0
            radius: sm
            shadow: none
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: md
            paddingInline: xl
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Learn More
          appearance:
            background:
              color: transparent
              transparency: 0
            border:
              width: 1
              style: solid
              color: '#d1d5db'
            radius: sm
            shadow: none
          typography:
            color: '#1E3A5F'
            weight: medium
            size: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Trusted by 2,000+ companies worldwide
        typography:
          color: '#6b7280'
          size: xs
          weight: regular
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 1
            style: solid
            color: '#e5e7eb'
          radius: sm
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: sm
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/3184291/pexels-photo-3184291.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=800
            altText: Team collaboration on modern workspace
          appearance:
            minHeight: 25
            fit: cover
            radius: sm

metadata.template_description: A team showcase using carousel slides with each slide containing a team member profile card featuring image, name heading, role caption, and social media icons

content:

  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 5000
      loop: true

      position: bottom

      paddingInline: lg

          horizontalAlign: center

metadata.template_title: Team Member Carousel Section — Sliding Team Showcase
metadata.template_description: A team showcase using carousel slides with each slide containing a team member profile card featuring image, name heading, role caption, and social media icons
metadata.template_use_cases: digital agency, tech startup, consulting firm, law firm, restaurant, bakery, creative studio, architecture firm, dental clinic, accounting firm
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, carousel, layout-column, image, heading, caption, paragraph, icon, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: OUR JOURNEY
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#2563eb'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Company Milestones
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: From a bold idea to a thriving company — here are the moments that shaped
        who we are today.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'

metadata.template_title: Company Timeline Section — Our Journey and Milestones
metadata.template_description: A vertical company history timeline using alternating layout-rows with year badges, milestone headings, description paragraphs, and achievement icons showing company growth story
metadata.template_use_cases: digital agency, tech startup, consulting firm, law firm, restaurant, bakery, creative studio, architecture firm, dental clinic, accounting firm
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, badge, heading, paragraph, icon, counter-up, br, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      align: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      wrap: wrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '16'
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: rocket
        size: '48'
        color: '#2563eb'
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: '2018'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#2563eb'
          radius: pill
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xs
          paddingInline: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
          size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: start
        widthMode: '66'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Beginning
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Founded in a small co-working space with just three people and a shared
          dream. We launched our first product and signed our initial five clients
          within the first quarter.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.7'

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: What Our Customers Say
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: bold
        color: '#1a1a2e'
        align: center
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Join thousands of happy customers
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#6b7280'
        align: center
  - name: ticker
    properties:
      behavior:
        direction: left
        speed: 35
        mode: continuous
        pauseOnHover: true
      layout:
        gap: lg
        widthMode: '280'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
        marginInline: none
      appearance:
        columnBackground: '#fefce8'
        columnTransparency: 100
        columnRadius: lg
        columnBorder:
          width: 1
          style: solid
          color: '#6b7280'
    columns:
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            gap: sm
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: rating
          properties:
            value: 5
            iconType: star
            showCount: false
            color: '#f59e0b'
            typography:
              size: md
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '"Absolutely love this product! The quality exceeded my expectations.
              Will definitely order again."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#31313D'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Sarah Mitchell
            level: 5
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1a1a2e'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Verified Buyer
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
    - components:

            gap: sm

            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg

        - name: rating

            iconType: star
            showCount: false

              size: sm
              color: '#31313D'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: James Rodriguez
            level: 5
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1a1a2e'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Verified Buyer
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            gap: sm
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: rating
          properties:
            value: 5
            iconType: star
            showCount: false
            color: '#f59e0b'
            typography:
              size: md
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '"Third purchase and each time flawless. Customer service is top-notch
              and really responsive."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#31313D'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Emily Chen
            level: 5
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1a1a2e'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Repeat Customer
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            gap: sm
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: rating
          properties:
            value: 5
            iconType: heart
            showCount: false
            color: '#f59e0b'
            typography:
              size: md
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '"Simply perfect! Bought as a gift and my partner absolutely loved
              it. Attention to detail is remarkable."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#31313D'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Priya Patel
            level: 5
            typography:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              color: '#1a1a2e'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Gift Buyer
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
    - components:

            paddingInline: lg

          properties:

            color: '#f59e0b'

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Trusted by Thousands
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: bold
        color: '#0c4a6e'
        align: center
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Real stories from real people who transformed their workflow
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
  - name: ticker
    properties:
      behavior:
        direction: left
        speed: 30
        mode: continuous
        pauseOnHover: true
      layout:
        gap: lg
        widthMode: '360'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
        marginInline: none
      appearance:
        columnBackground: '#f0f9ff'
        columnTransparency: 100
        columnRadius: lg
        columnBorder:
          width: 2
          style: solid
          color: '#0284c7'
    columns:
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            gap: md
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '"This platform cut our onboarding time in half. New team members
              are productive from day one. The learning curve is practically nonexistent."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#294E64'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              verticalAlign: center
              wrap: nowrap
            spacing:
              gap: sm
          components:

            properties:

              was incredible and the documentation is top-notch. Best decision we
              made this year."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#294E64'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              verticalAlign: center
              wrap: nowrap
            spacing:
              gap: sm
          components:

                altText: Ryan Cooper
              appearance:
                radius: pill
                fit: cover
                minHeight: 5
              layout:
                widthMode: fit
          - name: layout-column
            properties:
              layout:
                gap: none
            components:
            - name: heading
              properties:
                text: Ryan Cooper
                level: 5
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  weight: bold
                  color: '#0c4a6e'
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Engineering Lead, Nexora
                typography:
                  size: xs
                  color: '#64748b'
    - components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            gap: md
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: '"The analytics alone are worth the price. We can finally see exactly
              where bottlenecks are and fix them before they become problems. Game
              changer."'
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#294E64'
              lineHeight: relaxed
        - name: layout-row

          - name: image

metadata.template_description: A clean corporate titlebar with logo, company name, navigation links, and CTA button, followed by a hero section

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      align: center
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#0052CC'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Strategic Solutions for Growing Businesses
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: semibold
        color: '#1E3A5F'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: We help organizations streamline operations, reduce costs, and achieve
        measurable results with proven consulting methodologies.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.7'
      layout:
        widthMode: 75
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        align: center
    components:
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Get Started
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#0052CC'
          radius: sm
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xl
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: semibold
          size: md
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Learn More
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 1
            style: solid
            color: '#C5D4E3'
          radius: sm
        typography:
          color: '#1E3A5F'
          weight: medium
          size: md

content:

          colorEnd: '#C8D8F0'
          direction: to bottom right
    spacing:

      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Design That Speaks

        paddingInline: xl

    properties:
      text: We craft digital experiences that connect brands with their audience through
        thoughtful, intentional design.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#313541'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.8'
      layout:
        widthMode: 66
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
  - name: button
    properties:
      text: View Our Work
      appearance:
        background:
          type: gradient
          gradient:
            colorStart: '#EC4899'
            colorEnd: '#8B5CF6'
            direction: to right
        radius: pill
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: semibold
        size: md
